formulas.purpose_ar: مدخل نيتروجين غالبًا ما يفوت.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

chapters.title: DRIS & Plant Nutrition (Jones 2012)
chapters.intro: Diagnosis Recommendation Integrated System, critical values, sufficiency ranges.

formulas.name: DRIS Index (Diagnosis Recommendation Integrated System)
formulas.variables:
N/P = sample ratio
n/p = reference norm ratio
CV = coefficient of variation
All ratios log-normalized for low/high balance
formulas.purpose: Diagnose nutrient balance regardless of growth stage — used in leaf analysis.
formulas.example: Maize N/P=8 (norm 10, CV=0.15), N/K=1.5 (norm 1.5, CV=0.2) → index = [(8-10)/1.5 + 0]/2 = -0.67 (P relative deficiency).
formulas.pitfall: Using wrong reference norms for crop/stage — DRIS is sensitive.
formulas.decision: Most negative index = most limiting nutrient. Address first.
formulas.notes: Source: Beaufils (1973); Jones (2012) Plant Nutrition Manual Ch. 10.
formulas.purpose_ar: تشخيص توازن العناصر بغض النظر عن مرحلة النمو.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: Critical Value Range (CVR)
formulas.variables:
mean = mean of high-yielding population
SD = standard deviation
CVR = 95% sufficient range
formulas.purpose: Defines sufficiency ranges for leaf tissue tests.
formulas.example: Maize ear-leaf N: mean=3.0%, SD=0.2 → CVR = [2.61%, 3.39%]. Below 2.6 = deficient.
formulas.pitfall: Using CVR from a different growth stage or plant part.
formulas.decision: Below CVR: apply nutrient. Above: no response expected.
formulas.purpose_ar: يحدد نطاقات الكفاية لاختبارات الأوراق.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: Sufficiency Range (Marschner)
formulas.variables:
mean_low = deficiency threshold
mean_high = luxury threshold
k = 0.25 (lower 25% of sufficiency band)
formulas.purpose: Practical range for fertilizer recommendation.
formulas.example: Tomato leaf P: low=0.25%, high=0.50% → sufficiency = [0.31%, 0.50%].
formulas.pitfall: Confusing sufficiency with critical value — sufficiency is wider.
formulas.decision: In sufficiency range: maintain. Below: fertilize. Above: reduce.
formulas.purpose_ar: نطاق عملي لتوصية السماد.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

chapters.title: Disease Forecast Models
chapters.intro: Smith Period (late blight), FAST (early blight), TOM-CAST.

formulas.name: Smith Period (Late Blight)
formulas.formula: Smith Period = 2 consecutive days with T_min ≥ 10°C and RH ≥ 90% for ≥ 11 hours
formulas.variables:
T_min = daily minimum temperature
RH = relative humidity (≥ 90%)
11 hours = minimum duration
formulas.purpose: Predict Phytophthora infestans infection risk — UK Met Office standard.
formulas.example: 2 days with T_min=12°C, RH=92% for 13h → Smith Period met; high blight risk.
formulas.pitfall: Using RH at 2m instead of in-canopy (canopy RH is 5-10% higher).
formulas.decision: Apply preventive copper/mancozeb within 24h of Smith Period.
formulas.notes: Source: Smith (1956); UK Met Office; validated in BAMF system.
formulas.purpose_ar: التنبؤ بخطر الإصابة بـ Phytophthora infestans.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: FAST Model (Early Blight)
formulas.variables:
T_score = temperature rating (0-3) for 18-28°C
W_score = leaf wetness rating (0-3) for ≥12h wetness
Score > 30 = spray threshold
formulas.purpose: Forecast Alternaria solani on tomato/potato.
formulas.example: Day 1: T=2, W=3 (6 pts). Day 2: T=3, W=3 (9 pts). Day 3: T=2, W=2 (4 pts). 7-day total=42 → spray.
formulas.pitfall: Counting only rainy days — Alternaria infects with dew alone.
formulas.decision: Score ≥ 30: apply chlorothalonil or azoxystrobin.
formulas.notes: Source: Madden et al. (1978) FAST model.
formulas.purpose_ar: تنبؤ بـ Alternaria solani على الطماطم/البطاطس.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: TOM-CAST (Tomato Disease Forecasting)
formulas.formula: DSI = Σ (T_score × W_score) where T_score = 0 if T<13 or T>28
formulas.variables:
T_score = temperature severity (0-4)
W_score = leaf wetness severity (0-4)
DSI = Disease Severity Index
formulas.purpose: Combined early blight + anthracnose forecast for tomato.
formulas.example: DSI=35 → first spray. DSI=20 thereafter (every 7 days).
formulas.pitfall: Calibrating for dew vs rain-leaf-wetness sensors differ.
formulas.decision: Spray at DSI=35 first; DSI=20 thereafter.
formulas.notes: Source: Pitblado (1992) TOM-CAST; Ontario Ministry of Ag.
formulas.purpose_ar: تنبؤ أمراض الطماطم.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

chapters.title: Soil Health Indicators
chapters.intro: SOC stock, CEC, base saturation, lime requirement — USDA-NRCS + Cornell.

formulas.name: Soil Organic Carbon Stock
formulas.variables:
SOC% = soil organic carbon (%)
BD = bulk density (g/cm³)
D = depth (cm)
SOC_stock = t C/ha
formulas.purpose: Quantify carbon stored in soil — for carbon markets & soil health.
formulas.pitfall: Using disturbed (sieved) BD instead of clod BD; ignoring rock fraction.
formulas.decision: Increase SOC stock by 1 t/ha/yr via cover crops + no-till.
formulas.notes: Source: USDA-NRCS Soil Survey Manual; IPCC 2019.
formulas.purpose_ar: تقدير الكربون المخزن للأسواق وصحة التربة.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: Cation Exchange Capacity (effective)
formulas.formula: CEC_eff = (Ca²⁺ + Mg²⁺ + K⁺ + Na⁺ + H⁺ + Al³⁺) in meq/100g
formulas.variables:
All cations in meq/100g (= cmolc/kg)
CEC_eff = sum of exchangeable cations
formulas.purpose: Soil fertility indicator — capacity to hold nutrients.
formulas.pitfall: Confusing CEC at field pH vs effective CEC (includes exchangeable Al).
formulas.decision: CEC <5 sandy (split fertilize); 10-20 loam; >20 clay.
formulas.purpose_ar: مؤشر خصوبة التربة — القدرة على الاحتفاظ بالعناصر.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: Base Saturation Ratio
formulas.variables:
Ca, Mg, K, Na in meq/100g
CEC = total cation exchange capacity
formulas.purpose: Albrecht ratio — target Ca 65-75%, Mg 10-15%, K 3-7%.
formulas.pitfall: Albrecht ratios not universally accepted; use with soil pH test.
formulas.decision: Ca < 60%: apply lime/gypsum. Mg < 10%: apply dolomite.
formulas.purpose_ar: نسبة ألبريكت — الأهداف المثالية للكاتيونات.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: Soil pH Adjustment (Lime Requirement)
formulas.variables:
pH_target = desired pH (e.g. 6.5)
pH_current = measured pH
CEC = cation exchange capacity (meq/100g)
BD = bulk density (g/cm³)
D = depth (cm)
0.5 = empirical lime factor
formulas.purpose: Lime dose to raise soil pH — depends on buffering capacity.
formulas.example: Target 6.5, current 5.5, CEC=15, BD=1.3, D=15cm → Lime = 1×15×1.3×15×0.5 = 146 t/ha (x2 to convert to CaCO₃).
formulas.pitfall: Using SMP buffer incorrectly — only works on certain soils.
formulas.decision: Apply in 2 split doses 6 months apart; retest after 1 year.
formulas.purpose_ar: جرعة الجير لرفع درجة حموضة التربة.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

chapters.title: Water Productivity (FAO)
chapters.intro: Water productivity, IWUE, leaching requirement.

formulas.name: Water Productivity (Crop)
formulas.variables:
Y = crop yield (kg/ha)
ETc = actual evapotranspiration (m³/ha)
WP = water productivity (kg/m³)
formulas.purpose: kg of crop per m³ of water — key metric for water-scarce agriculture.
formulas.example: Wheat: Y=6000, ETc=5000m³ → WP=1.2 kg/m³. Global benchmark: 1.0-1.5.
formulas.pitfall: Using irrigation volume instead of ETc — ignores rain and soil water.
formulas.decision: WP < 0.8: improve variety, irrigation timing, or mulching.
formulas.purpose_ar: كجم محصول لكل م³ ماء — مقياس رئيسي للزراعة المحدودة المياه.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: Irrigation Water Use Efficiency
formulas.variables:
Y_irrig = yield with irrigation
Y_rainfed = yield without irrigation
I = irrigation applied (m³/ha)
formulas.purpose: Marginal productivity of irrigation — justifies irrigation investment.
formulas.example: Y_irrig=8000, Y_rainfed=5000, I=3000 → IWUE = 1.0 kg/m³ additional yield per m³ water.
formulas.pitfall: Comparing IWUE across climates — arid regions show higher values.
formulas.decision: IWUE < 0.5: reconsider irrigation investment.
formulas.purpose_ar: الإنتاجية الحدية للري.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: Leaching Requirement (LR)
formulas.variables:
EC_iw = irrigation water salinity (dS/m)
EC_threshold = crop salt tolerance threshold (dS/m)
formulas.purpose: Extra water needed to flush salts below root zone.
formulas.example: Tomato EC_threshold=2.5, EC_iw=3.0 → LR = 3.0/(12.5-3.0) = 0.32 → apply 32% extra water.
formulas.pitfall: Using EC of saturation extract (ECe) for EC_iw — wrong scale.
formulas.decision: If LR > 0.5, switch to salt-tolerant variety or blend water.
formulas.purpose_ar: الماء الإضافي لطرد الأملاح تحت منطقة الجذور.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

chapters.title: Yield Gap & Economics
chapters.intro: Yield gap, harvest index, partial budget analysis.

formulas.name: Yield Gap
formulas.variables:
Y_potential = potential yield (variety × climate)
Y_actual = farmer's actual yield
formulas.purpose: Quantify unrealized yield — key metric for development programs.
formulas.example: Maize Y_potential=12 t/ha, actual=7 → YG = 5 t/ha (42% gap).
formulas.pitfall: Using record yield as potential — should be climate-adjusted.
formulas.decision: Close yield gap via: 30% nutrient, 25% water, 20% pest, 25% management.
formulas.notes: Source: FAO; GYGA (Global Yield Gap Atlas).
formulas.purpose_ar: تقدير الإنتاج غير المحقق.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: Harvest Index (HI)
formulas.variables:
Y_grain = grain yield (kg/ha)
Y_biomass = total aboveground biomass (kg/ha)
HI = 0 to 1
formulas.purpose: Partitioning efficiency — modern varieties HI 0.50; old 0.30.
formulas.example: Wheat: grain=6000, biomass=12000 → HI=0.50. Excellent.
formulas.pitfall: Including root biomass (changes HI dramatically).
formulas.decision: HI < 0.40: improve fertility, water, or disease control.
formulas.purpose_ar: كفاءة التقسيم بين الحبوب والكتلة الحيوية.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: Partial Budget Analysis
formulas.variables:
B_new = benefits of new practice
B_old = benefits of current
C_new = costs of new practice
C_old = costs of current
formulas.purpose: Evaluate if a management change is profitable.
formulas.example: New fertigation: B_new=$3000/ha, B_old=$2500. C_new=$700, C_old=$400. Net = 500-300 = $200/ha benefit.
formulas.pitfall: Forgetting opportunity cost; ignoring risk premium.
formulas.decision: Adopt if Net > 0 AND payback < 3 years.
formulas.purpose_ar: تقييم ربحية تغيير الإدارة.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

chapters.title: Animal Science Metrics
chapters.intro: BCS, water quality, grazing rest, FCR.

formulas.name: Body Condition Score Change
formulas.variables:
BCS_end = score at end (1-5)
BCS_start = score at start
weeks = observation period
formulas.purpose: Monitor energy balance in dairy cows — losing > 0.5 BCS/week is risky.
formulas.example: Fresh cow: BCS 3.5 → 3.0 in 4 weeks → change = -0.125/week (acceptable).
formulas.pitfall: Subjective scoring — use same trained scorer throughout.
formulas.decision: Lose > 0.5/wk: increase energy density; check ketosis.
formulas.purpose_ar: مراقبة توازن الطاقة في الأبقار.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: Water Quality Index (Aquaculture)
formulas.variables:
Wi = weight of parameter i
Qi = quality rating (0-100) of parameter i
DO, pH, T, NH₃, turbidity common parameters
formulas.purpose: Single metric for aquaculture water quality.
formulas.pitfall: Using wrong weights — calibrate to species tolerance.
formulas.decision: WQI < 70: water exchange. < 50: emergency harvest.
formulas.purpose_ar: مقياس واحد لجودة ماء الاستزراع السمكي.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: Rotational Grazing Rest Period
formulas.variables:
TR = total rest required (days)
n = number of paddocks
PD = paddock grazing duration (days)
formulas.purpose: Size rotational grazing system for sustainable forage use.
formulas.example: TR=30d, n=8, PD=3d → RP = 30/7 - 3 = 1.3d (too short — increase paddocks).
formulas.pitfall: Underestimating regrowth time in dry conditions.
formulas.decision: Adjust paddock count to give 25-40 days rest in temperate climates.
formulas.notes: Source: USDA-NRCS; Barnes et al. (2007) Forages.
formulas.purpose_ar: تحديد نظام الرعي الدوار للاستخدام المستدام.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: Feed Conversion Ratio (FCR)
formulas.variables:
Feed_DM = feed dry matter intake (kg)
Weight_gain = animal weight gain (kg)
formulas.purpose: Efficiency of converting feed to animal mass — key economic metric.
formulas.example: Broiler: 3.0 kg feed → 1.6 kg gain → FCR = 1.875. Excellent.
formulas.pitfall: Using as-fed feed instead of DM; including mortality.
formulas.decision: Cattle FCR > 8: check parasites, genetics. Poultry > 2.2: disease check.
formulas.purpose_ar: كفاءة تحويل العلف إلى كتلة حيوانية.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

chapters.title: Sustainability Scorecards
chapters.intro: Carbon footprint, SAFA sustainability index, Cornell soil health score.

formulas.name: Carbon Footprint per kg Product
formulas.variables:
Total_GHG = all emissions (kg CO₂e/ha)
Yield = product yield (kg/ha)
CF = kg CO₂e per kg product
formulas.purpose: Compare sustainability across production systems.
formulas.example: Wheat: 2000 kg CO₂e/ha / 6000 kg/ha = 0.33 kg CO₂e/kg wheat. Beef: 12000 / 800 = 15 kg CO₂e/kg.
formulas.pitfall: Forgetting soil carbon sequestration (net-zero possible).
formulas.decision: Benchmark: wheat <0.5, tomato <0.3, chicken <3, beef <20.
formulas.purpose_ar: مقارنة الاستدامة عبر نظم الإنتاج.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: Sustainability Index (SAFA)
formulas.variables:
Econ = economic score (0-100)
Env = environmental score (0-100)
Social = social score (0-100)
Governance = governance score (0-100)
formulas.purpose: Holistic sustainability — FAO SAFA framework.
formulas.example: Econ=70, Env=55, Social=80, Gov=60 → SI = 66.3 (moderate).
formulas.pitfall: Weighting all 4 equally — adjust for stakeholder priorities.
formulas.decision: SI < 50: high-risk operation. > 75: leader.
formulas.notes: Source: FAO SAFA (2013) Sustainability Assessment of Food and Agriculture.
formulas.purpose_ar: استدامة شاملة — إطار SAFA.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

formulas.name: Soil Health Score (Cornell)
formulas.formula: SHS = (OC + AC + BS + pH + EC + ROT) / 6
formulas.variables:
OC = organic carbon score
AC = active carbon score
BS = base saturation score
pH = pH score
EC = biological activity
ROT = root health rating
Each 0-100
formulas.purpose: Comprehensive soil health — Cornell Comprehensive Assessment.
formulas.example: OC=60, AC=50, BS=80, pH=85, EC=70, ROT=75 → SHS=70 (good).
formulas.pitfall: Sampling only top 15cm — miss subsoil constraints.
formulas.decision: SHS <50: plant cover crop, reduce tillage, add compost.
formulas.notes: Source: Cornell Soil Health Lab (Moebius-Clune et al. 2016).
formulas.purpose_ar: صحة شاملة للتربة — تقييم كورنيل.
formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Plant Population (PP)
all_formulas.formula: PP = (Area m² × 10,000) / (Row Spacing cm × Plant Spacing cm)
all_formulas.variables:
Area = m²
Spacing = cm
all_formulas.purpose: Estimate plants per hectare based on chosen spacing.
all_formulas.pitfall: Confusing cm and m; forgetting field mortality.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقدير عدد النباتات للهكتار بناءً على المسافة المحددة.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
المساحة = م²
المسافة = سم

all_formulas.name: Seed Rate (SR)
all_formulas.formula: SR = (Target Population × Test Weight g) / (1000 × 100 × Germination% × Purity%)
all_formulas.variables:
Test Weight = g per 1000 seeds
Germination & Purity = decimal (0.90 not 90)
all_formulas.purpose: Translate target population to kg seed to purchase.
all_formulas.example: 350,000 plants/ha, 35 g TW, 90% germ, 98% purity → SR = 126 kg/ha.
all_formulas.pitfall: Misplacing % as whole number instead of decimal.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تحويل الكثافة المستهدفة إلى كجم من البذور للشراء.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
الوزن التجريبي = جرام لكل 1000 بذرة
الإنبات والنقاوة = رقم عشري (0.90 وليس 90)

all_formulas.name: Real Value of Seed (RVS)
all_formulas.variables:
Purity = % pure seed by weight
Germination = % viable
all_formulas.purpose: Proportion of seed lot that is viable and pure.
all_formulas.example: Purity 98%, germination 90% → RVS = 88.2%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: النسبة المئوية لمجموعة البذور التي تكون حية ونقية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
النقاوة = نسبة البذور النقية بالوزن
الإنبات = نسبة البذور الحية

all_formulas.name: Cropping Intensity (CI)
all_formulas.formula: CI (%) = Gross Cropped Area / Net Cultivable Area × 100
all_formulas.variables: Gross Cropped Area = total area sown across all seasons
all_formulas.purpose: Measures how many times land is cropped in a year.
all_formulas.example: 200 ha gross cropped on 100 ha land → CI = 200%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: قياس عدد مرات زراعة الأرض في السنة.
all_formulas.variables_ar: المساحة المزروعة الإجمالية = المساحة الإجمالية المزروعة عبر جميع الموسمات

all_formulas.name: Land Equivalent Ratio (LER) ★ Key Index
all_formulas.variables:
Yia, Yib = intercrop yields of species a and b
Ysa, Ysb = sole crop yields
all_formulas.purpose: Measures yield advantage of intercropping vs. monoculture.
all_formulas.example: Maize/cowpea intercrop with LER = 1.35 → 35% land advantage.
all_formulas.pitfall: Always compare to same season sole crop controls.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: قياس ميزة المحصول في الزراعة المختلطة مقارنة بالزراعة الأحادية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Yia, Yib = محاصيل الزراعة المختلقة لنوعي أ و ب
Ysa, Ysb = محاصيل الزراعة الأحادية لنوعي أ و ب

all_formulas.name: Monetary Advantage Index (MAI)
all_formulas.variables:
LER = Land Equivalent Ratio
TMV = monetary value of total intercrop produce
all_formulas.purpose: Captures the financial advantage of intercropping over monoculture.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يحلل الميزة المالية للزراعة المختلطة مقارنة بالزراعة الأحادية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
LER = معدل المكافأة الأرضية
TMV = القيمة المادية الإجمالية لمنتج الزراعة المختلقة

all_formulas.name: Fertilizer Requirement
all_formulas.formula: Fertilizer (kg/ha) = 100 × Recommended Rate (kg/ha) / Nutrient% in product
all_formulas.variables:
Recommended rate = nutrient element (N, P, K)
Nutrient % = label value
all_formulas.purpose: Convert nutrient requirement to commercial fertilizer quantity.
all_formulas.example: 120 kg N/ha needed; urea 46% N → 261 kg urea/ha.
all_formulas.pitfall: Confusing element rate with oxide form (P vs P₂O₅).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تحويل احتياجات العناصر الغذائية إلى كمية الأسمدة التجارية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
المعدل الموصى به = عنصر غذائي (N, P, K)
نسبة العنصر الغذائي = القيمة الموجودة على العبوة

all_formulas.name: Agronomic Efficiency (AE)
all_formulas.formula: AE = (Yf − Yu) / N_applied  [kg yield / kg nutrient]
all_formulas.variables:
Yf = yield with fertilizer
Yu = yield without fertilizer
N_applied = kg/ha
all_formulas.purpose: Yield gain per kg of nutrient applied.
all_formulas.example: Yf=5 t/ha, Yu=3 t/ha, N=100 kg/ha → AE = 20 kg grain/kg N.
all_formulas.pitfall: Always specify which NUE metric is reported; they differ substantially.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: زيادة المحصول لكل كجم من العنصر الغذائي المطبق.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Yf = المحصول مع استخدام الأسمدة
Yu = المحصول بدون استخدام الأسمدة
N_applied = كجم/هكتار

all_formulas.name: Apparent Nutrient Recovery (ANR)
all_formulas.variables: NUf, NUu = nutrient uptake with/without fertilizer (kg/ha)
all_formulas.purpose: Percentage of applied nutrient recovered by the crop.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: النسبة المئوية للعنصر الغذائي المطبق الذي يسترده المحصول.
all_formulas.variables_ar: NUf, NUu = امتصاص العنصر الغذائي مع/بدون استخدام الأسمدة (كجم/هكتار)

all_formulas.name: Partial Factor Productivity (PFP)
all_formulas.formula: PFP = Y / N_applied  [kg yield / kg nutrient]
all_formulas.variables: Y = total yield including soil contribution
all_formulas.purpose: Total yield per unit of nutrient applied; broadest NUE measure.
all_formulas.example: Y=5 t/ha, N=100 kg → PFP = 50 kg/kg.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: المحصول الإجمالي لكل وحدة من العنصر الغذائي المطبق; أوسع مقاييس كفاءة استخدام العنصر الغذائي.
all_formulas.variables_ar: Y = المحصول الإجمالي بما في ذلك مساهمة التربة

all_formulas.name: Weed Control Efficiency (WCE)
all_formulas.variables:
WDc = weed dry weight in control
WDt = weed dry weight in treatment
all_formulas.purpose: Measures how effectively a treatment reduces weed biomass.
all_formulas.example: Control=500 g/m², treatment=150 g/m² → WCE = 70%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يقيس مدى فعالية العلاج في تقليل كتلة الأعشاب الجافة.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
WDc = وزن الأعشاب الجافة في المجموعة الضابطة
WDt = وزن الأعشاب الجافة في المجموعة المعالجة

all_formulas.name: Economic Threshold Level (ETL)
all_formulas.variables:
C = cost of control
V = crop market value/unit
I = injury per pest
D = pest density
K = proportion of damage avoided
all_formulas.purpose: Determines when pest control becomes economically justifiable.
all_formulas.example: Spray only when pest density exceeds the ETL threshold.
all_formulas.pitfall: ETL is dynamic — recalculate when crop prices or pest densities change.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يحدد متى يصبح مكافحة الآفات مبرراً اقتصادياً.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
C = تكلفة السيطرة
V = قيمة السوق للمحصول/الوحدة
I = إصابة لكل آفة
D = كثافة الآفة
K = النسبة المئوية للضرر المُتَجَنَّب

all_formulas.name: Net Irrigation Requirement (NIR)
all_formulas.variables:
ETc = crop evapotranspiration (mm)
Pe = effective rainfall (mm)
all_formulas.purpose: Net water needed by the crop from irrigation.
all_formulas.example: ETc=450 mm, Pe=120 mm → NIR = 330 mm.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: المياه الصافية التي يحتاجها المحصول من الري.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
ETc = التبخر النتحي للمحصول (ملم)
Pe = الأمطار الفعالة (ملم)

all_formulas.name: Gross Irrigation Requirement (GIR)
all_formulas.variables: Ea = application efficiency (decimal, e.g. 0.75)
all_formulas.purpose: Total water to apply at field level, accounting for losses.
all_formulas.example: NIR=330 mm, Ea=0.75 → GIR = 440 mm.
all_formulas.pitfall: Forgetting that Ea < 1 means GIR always exceeds NIR.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: إجمالي المياه التي تطبق على مستوى الحقل، مع الأخذ في الاعتبار الفقد.
all_formulas.variables_ar: Ea = كفاءة التطبيق (عشرية، مثلاً 0.75)

all_formulas.name: Water Use Efficiency (WUE)
all_formulas.formula: WUE = Yield / Water used  [kg/mm or kg/m³]
all_formulas.variables:
Yield = economic yield (kg/ha)
Water used = total ET or applied irrigation
all_formulas.purpose: Measures crop productivity per unit of water consumed.
all_formulas.example: 5 t grain/ha with 450 mm water → WUE = 11.1 kg/mm.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يقيس إنتاجية المحصول لكل وحدة من المياه المستهلكة.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
المحصول = المحصول الاقتصادي (كجم/هكتار)
المياه المستخدمة = إجمالي التبخر النتحي أو الري المطبق

all_formulas.name: Bulk Density (BD)
all_formulas.formula: BD = Oven-dry soil mass / Total soil volume  [g/cm³]
all_formulas.variables: Typical range: 1.1–1.6 g/cm³ for mineral soils
all_formulas.purpose: Indicator of compaction and porosity.
all_formulas.example: Mass 130 g, volume 100 cm³ → BD = 1.3 g/cm³.
all_formulas.pitfall: Use undisturbed core samples only.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مؤشر للانضغاطية والمسامية.
all_formulas.variables_ar: المدى النموذجي: 1.1-1.6 غ/سم³ للتربة المعدنية

all_formulas.name: Porosity
all_formulas.variables:
BD = bulk density
PD = particle density (≈2.65 g/cm³ for mineral soil)
all_formulas.purpose: Indicates soil aeration and water holding capacity.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تشير إلى تهوية التربة وقدرتها على الاحتفاظ بالمياه.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
BD = الكثافة الظاهرية
PD = الكثافة الجسيمية (≈2.65 غ/سم³ للتربة المعدنية)

all_formulas.name: Sodium Adsorption Ratio (SAR)
all_formulas.variables:
All ions in mmol/L or meq/L
SAR > 13 = sodicity hazard
all_formulas.purpose: Assess irrigation water quality and sodicity risk.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقييم جودة مياه الري ومخاطر الصوديوم.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
جميع الأيونات في ملليمول/لتر أو مكافئ ملليمول/لتر
SAR > 13 = خطر الصوديوم

all_formulas.name: Absolute Growth Rate (AGR)
all_formulas.variables:
W = plant dry weight (g)
t = time (days)
all_formulas.purpose: Increase in weight per unit time; simple, intuitive growth measure.
all_formulas.example: W₁=10 g at day 20, W₂=40 g at day 40 → AGR = 1.5 g/day.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: زيادة الوزن لكل وحدة زمنية؛ مقياس بسيط وواضح للنمو.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
W = وزن النبات الجاف (غرام)
t = الوقت (أيام)

all_formulas.name: Harvest Index (HI)
all_formulas.variables:
Economic yield = grain, fiber, tuber (marketed)
Biological yield = total above-ground biomass
all_formulas.purpose: Efficiency of converting biomass to marketable product.
all_formulas.example: Grain=5 t/ha, biomass=12 t/ha → HI = 41.7%.
all_formulas.pitfall: Typical range 30–50% for cereals; below 30% indicates poor partitioning.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: كفاءة تحويل الكتلة الحيوية إلى منتج قابل للتسويق.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
المحصول الاقتصادي = الحبوب، الألياف، الدرن (مُسَوَّق)
المحصول البيولوجي = إجمالي الكتلة الحيوية فوق سطح الأرض

all_formulas.name: Growing Degree Days (GDD)
all_formulas.variables:
Tbase = biological zero (e.g. 10°C for maize)
Sum daily across growth period
all_formulas.purpose: Heat unit accumulation governing phenology and maturity timing.
all_formulas.example: Tmax=28°C, Tmin=16°C, Tbase=10°C → GDD/day = 12.
all_formulas.pitfall: Use crop-specific Tbase; avoid truncating negative values inconsistently.

all_formulas.name: NDVI – Normalized Difference Vegetation Index
all_formulas.variables:
NIR = near-infrared reflectance
Red = red band reflectance
Range: −1 to +1
all_formulas.purpose: Most widely used vegetation vigor index; correlates with LAI and biomass.
all_formulas.example: NIR=0.65, Red=0.25 → NDVI = 0.44 (moderate-good cover).
all_formulas.pitfall: Saturates at high LAI; use EVI for dense canopies.

all_formulas.name: SAVI – Soil-Adjusted Vegetation Index
all_formulas.variables:
L = soil adjustment factor (0.5 default)
Reduces soil background effect
all_formulas.purpose: Corrects NDVI for bare soil influence in sparse canopies.
all_formulas.example: Same bands as NDVI, L=0.5; preferred for < 15% cover.

all_formulas.name: VHI – Vegetation Health Index
all_formulas.variables:
VCI = Vegetation Condition Index (greenness vs history)
TCI = Temperature Condition Index
a = weight (typically 0.5)
all_formulas.purpose: Combines greenness and thermal stress into a drought composite.
all_formulas.example: VCI=37.5%, TCI=50%, a=0.5 → VHI = 43.75 (moderate stress).

all_formulas.name: Dry Matter Intake (DMI)
all_formulas.variables: Typical: 2.5–4% of body weight for dairy cows
all_formulas.purpose: Quantifies actual dry matter consumed; basis for ration formulation.
all_formulas.example: Cow offered 25 kg DM, refused 3 kg → DMI = 22 kg/day.

all_formulas.name: Feed Conversion Ratio (FCR)
all_formulas.formula: FCR = Feed intake / Weight gain  [kg feed/kg gain]
all_formulas.variables:
Lower FCR = better efficiency
Typical: broilers 1.6–2.0, beef 6–8
all_formulas.purpose: Industry benchmark for feed efficiency.
all_formulas.example: Lamb: 40 kg feed, 10 kg gain → FCR = 4.0.
all_formulas.pitfall: Must specify the feed basis (as-fed vs dry matter).

all_formulas.name: Energy-Corrected Milk (ECM)
all_formulas.variables: Milk = kg/day; Fat, Protein = kg/day (not %)
all_formulas.purpose: Standardizes milk yield for fat and protein content to allow fair comparisons.
all_formulas.example: 25 kg milk, 0.95 kg fat, 0.80 kg protein → ECM = 32.7 kg/day.
all_formulas.pitfall: Convert % to kg by multiplying by milk yield first.

all_formulas.name: Average Daily Gain (ADG)
all_formulas.formula: ADG = (Final weight − Initial weight) / Days  [kg/day or g/day]
all_formulas.variables: Weigh animals at consistent times (morning, after overnight fast)
all_formulas.purpose: Standard growth measurement across species and production systems.
all_formulas.example: Calf: 320 kg final − 200 kg initial, 120 days → ADG = 1.0 kg/day.
all_formulas.pitfall: Use multiple weighing periods to smooth measurement error.

all_formulas.name: Kleiber Ratio (KR)
all_formulas.formula: KR = ADG / Metabolic weight  where Metabolic weight = BW^0.75
all_formulas.variables:
BW = body weight (kg)
Allows growth comparison across breeds/sizes
all_formulas.purpose: Growth efficiency index independent of animal size.

all_formulas.name: Conception Rate (CR)
all_formulas.variables: Target: >60% for dairy cattle with good heat detection
all_formulas.purpose: Efficiency of a single insemination or mating event.
all_formulas.example: 100 cows inseminated, 45 conceived → CR = 45% (below target).
all_formulas.pitfall: Low CR may reflect heat detection failure, not poor fertility.

all_formulas.name: Calving Interval (CI)
all_formulas.variables:
Days open = days from calving to next conception
Target: 365–400 days
all_formulas.purpose: Fundamental dairy efficiency metric linking reproduction and lactation.
all_formulas.example: Gestation 280 days, days open 90 → CI = 370 days (good).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مؤشر أساسي لفعالية الحليب يربط بين التكاثر والرضاعة.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Days open = الأيام من الولادة إلى الحمل التالي
الهدف: 365-400 يوم

all_formulas.name: Genetic Gain (ΔG)
all_formulas.variables:
i = selection intensity
r = accuracy of selection
σA = additive genetic SD
L = generation interval (years)
all_formulas.purpose: Predicts annual genetic progress from a selection program.
all_formulas.example: i=1.2, r=0.7, σA=10, L=5 yrs → ΔG = 1.68 units/year.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يتنبأ بالتقدم الوراثي السنني من برنامج الاختيار.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
i = شدة الاختيار
r = دقة الاختيار
σA = الانحراف المعياري الوراثي الإضافي
L = فترة الجيل (سنوات)

all_formulas.name: Fat-Corrected Milk (FCM)
all_formulas.variables:
Milk = kg/day
Fat = kg/day
all_formulas.purpose: Standardizes milk yield to 4% fat basis for comparisons.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: ي标准化 إنتاج الحليح إلى أساس 4% دهون للتباين.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Milk = كجم/يوم
Fat = كجم/يوم

all_formulas.name: Persistency Index (PI)
all_formulas.formula: PI (%) = Milk yield later / Peak yield × 100
all_formulas.variables: Compare a standard reference period to peak production
all_formulas.purpose: Measures how well cows sustain production after peak lactation.
all_formulas.example: Peak 45 kg/day, month 7 yield 32 kg/day → PI = 71%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يقيس مدى قدرة الأبقار على الحفاظ على الإنتاج بعد ذروة الرضاعة.
all_formulas.variables_ar: يتم مقارنة فترة مرجعية قياسية مع الإنتاج ذروة

all_formulas.name: Somatic Cell Score (SCS)
all_formulas.variables:
SCC = somatic cell count (cells/mL)
SCS < 4.5 = healthy udder
all_formulas.purpose: Log-transformed SCC; more normally distributed for genetic analysis.
all_formulas.example: SCC=200,000 → SCS = log₂(2)+3 = 4.0 (acceptable).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: عدد الخلايا الجسدية المحول إلى لوغاريتم; توزيعه أكثر طبيعية للتحليل الوراثي.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
SCC = عدد الخلايا الجسدية (خلية/مل)
SCS < 4.5 = ضرع صحي

all_formulas.name: Dressing Percentage (DP)
all_formulas.variables:
Cattle: 55–65%
Sheep/goats: 45–55%
Broilers: 70–75%
all_formulas.purpose: Basic measure of proportion of live weight becoming saleable carcass.
all_formulas.example: Sheep: live 40 kg, carcass 20 kg → DP = 50%.
all_formulas.pitfall: Confounding effects: gut fill, hide, breed type.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مؤشر أساسي لنسبة الوزن الحي الذي يصبح جثة للبيع.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
الماشية: 55-65%
الغنم/الماعز: 45-55%
الدجاج المبيد: 70-75%

all_formulas.name: Broiler Performance Efficiency Factor (BPEF / EBI)
all_formulas.variables:
Livability = % surviving
BW = body weight at slaughter
FCR = feed conversion ratio
all_formulas.purpose: Industry composite index of broiler production efficiency.
all_formulas.example: 95% livability, 2.0 kg BW, 40 days, FCR 1.8 → EBI = 263.
all_formulas.name_ar: عامل كفاءة أداء الدجاج المبيد (BPEF / EBI)
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مؤشر تجمع صناعي لكفاءة إنتاج الدجاج المبيد.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Livability = النسبة المئوية للبقاء
BW = الوزن الجسمي عند الذبح
FCR = نسبة التحويل الغذائي

all_formulas.name: Hen-Day Egg Production (HDEP)
all_formulas.formula: HDEP (%) = Eggs produced / Hens present that day × 100
all_formulas.variables:
Measured daily
Reflects current flock productivity
all_formulas.purpose: Daily productivity benchmark excluding mortality effects.
all_formulas.example: 950 eggs from 1,000 hens present → HDEP = 95%.
all_formulas.pitfall: Does not account for cumulative mortality; use HHEP for that.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مؤشر إنتاجية يومي يتجاهل تأثير الوفيات.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
يتم قياسه يوميا
يعكس إنتاجية قطيع الحالي

all_formulas.name: Haugh Unit (HU)
all_formulas.variables:
H = albumen height (mm)
W = egg weight (g)
HU > 72 = Grade AA; < 60 = Grade B
all_formulas.purpose: Standard measure of egg interior quality (freshness).
all_formulas.example: H=8 mm, W=60 g → HU ≈ 88 (excellent quality).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مؤشر قياسي لجودة داخل البيض (الطازجة).
all_formulas.variables_ar:
H = ارتفاع البياض (ملم)
W = وزن البيضة (جم)
HU > 72 = الدرجة AA; < 60 = الدرجة B

all_formulas.name: Aridity Index (AI)
all_formulas.variables:
AI < 0.05 = hyper-arid
0.05–0.2 = arid
0.2–0.5 = semi-arid
0.5–0.65 = dry sub-humid
all_formulas.purpose: Classifies climate zones and guides crop selection and water management.
all_formulas.example: P=300 mm, PET=800 mm → AI = 0.375 (semi-arid).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يصنف مناخات المناطق ويوجه اختيار المحاصيل وإدارة المياه.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
AI < 0.05 = جاف جدا
0.05-0.2 = جاف
0.2-0.5 = شبه جاف
0.5-0.65 = شبه رطب جاف

all_formulas.name: Moisture Deficit Index (MDI)
all_formulas.variables:
PET = potential evapotranspiration
P = precipitation
Range 0–1
all_formulas.purpose: Proportion of water demand not met by rainfall.
all_formulas.example: PET=700, P=300 → MDI = 0.57 (moderate deficit).

all_formulas.name: Benefit-Cost Ratio (B:C)
all_formulas.formula: B:C = Total gross returns / Total costs
all_formulas.variables:
B:C > 1 = profitable
Include all variable and fixed costs
all_formulas.purpose: Simple profitability assessment for farm enterprises.
all_formulas.example: Returns $5,000, Costs $3,500 → B:C = 1.43 (profitable).
all_formulas.pitfall: Ignores time value of money; use NPV for multi-year investments.

all_formulas.name: Gross Margin (GM)
all_formulas.formula: GM = Gross revenue − Variable costs  [$/ha or $/head]
all_formulas.variables: Does not deduct fixed/overhead costs
all_formulas.purpose: Most common farm enterprise comparison metric.
all_formulas.example: Revenue $4,000/ha, variable costs $1,800/ha → GM = $2,200/ha.

all_formulas.name: Net Present Value (NPV)
all_formulas.variables:
CFt = cash flow in year t
r = discount rate
NPV > 0 = invest
all_formulas.purpose: Time-adjusted profitability for capital investments (irrigation, livestock housing).
all_formulas.example: Use 10–12% discount rate for agricultural investments in developing markets.

all_formulas.name: Shannon Diversity Index (H')
all_formulas.variables:
pi = proportion of species i in community
Higher H' = greater diversity
all_formulas.purpose: Measures species diversity combining richness and evenness.

all_formulas.name: Microbial Biomass Carbon (MBC)
all_formulas.formula: MBC = (C_fumigated − C_control) / kEC  [mg C kg⁻¹ soil]
all_formulas.variables:
kEC = extraction efficiency factor (0.45 commonly used)
Measured by chloroform fumigation-extraction (CFE)
Typical range: 100–1500 mg C/kg
all_formulas.purpose: Estimates the mass of living microbial cells in soil; sensitive early indicator of soil quality change.
all_formulas.example: Fumigated soil C = 250 mg/kg, control = 140 mg/kg → MBC = (250−140)/0.45 = 244 mg C/kg.
all_formulas.pitfall: Highly sensitive to sampling date, soil moisture, and temperature — standardize conditions.

all_formulas.name: Metabolic Quotient (qCO₂)
all_formulas.formula: qCO₂ = Soil respiration / MBC  [mg CO₂-C g⁻¹ MBC h⁻¹]
all_formulas.variables:
Soil respiration = CO₂ evolved per unit time
MBC = microbial biomass carbon
Lower qCO₂ = more efficient microbial community
all_formulas.purpose: Measures metabolic efficiency of soil microbial community. High qCO₂ indicates stress.
all_formulas.example: Respiration = 0.08 mg CO₂-C/g/h, MBC = 400 mg/kg → qCO₂ = 0.0002.

all_formulas.name: Soil Enzyme Activity Index (EAI)
all_formulas.formula: EAI = (Enzyme activity observed / Enzyme activity reference) × 100
all_formulas.variables:
Key enzymes: urease, phosphatase, dehydrogenase, β-glucosidase
Reference = optimal baseline for soil type
all_formulas.purpose: Composite of enzyme activities reflecting nutrient cycling capacity.
all_formulas.example: Dehydrogenase = 45 μg TPF/g/24h; reference = 60 → EAI = 75% (reduced activity).

all_formulas.name: Fungal:Bacterial (F:B) Ratio
all_formulas.formula: F:B = Fungal biomass / Bacterial biomass  [from PLFA or qPCR]
all_formulas.variables:
Estimated from phospholipid fatty acid (PLFA) profiles
F:B > 1 common in undisturbed or high-OM soils
Fungi dominate carbon cycling in agroforestry
all_formulas.purpose: Indicates decomposition pathways and soil disturbance history.
all_formulas.example: Fungal PLFA = 22 nmol/g, bacterial PLFA = 44 nmol/g → F:B = 0.50.

all_formulas.name: Microbial Biomass Nitrogen (MBN)
all_formulas.formula: MBN = (N_fumigated − N_control) / kEN  [mg N kg⁻¹ soil]
all_formulas.variables:
kEN = 0.54 (extraction coefficient)
MBN:MBC ratio reflects microbial C:N constraint
all_formulas.purpose: Estimates nitrogen immobilized in microbial biomass; important for N release timing.
all_formulas.example: MBC:MBN ratio < 5 → excess N release; > 15 → N immobilization risk.

all_formulas.name: Leaf Appearance Rate (LAR)
all_formulas.formula: LAR = Number of leaves / Thermal time elapsed  [leaves °Cd⁻¹]
all_formulas.variables:
Thermal time = cumulative GDD from emergence
Species-specific: maize ≈ 1 leaf per 60–80°Cd
all_formulas.purpose: Predicts leaf number at any thermal time; used to time management interventions.
all_formulas.example: Maize at 400 GDD: LAR = 0.014 leaves/°Cd → ≈ 5.6 leaves expected.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يُتنبأ بعدد الأوراق في أي وقت حراري؛ يُستخدم لتحديد وقت تدخلات الإدارة.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
الوقت الحراري = G 누적 من وقت الظهور
خاصية النوع: الذرة ≈ 1 ورقة لكل 60-80 درجة مئوية يوم

all_formulas.name: Phyllochron
all_formulas.formula: Phyllochron = Thermal time between successive leaf appearances  [°Cd leaf⁻¹]
all_formulas.variables:
Inverse of LAR
Maize: 45–80°Cd
Wheat: 90–110°Cd
Used in crop simulation models
all_formulas.purpose: Fundamental parameter for crop development models (CERES, APSIM).
all_formulas.example: Two leaves appear over 120°Cd → phyllochron = 60°Cd/leaf.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: معلمة أساسية لنماذج تطوير المحاصيل (CERES, APSIM).
all_formulas.variables_ar:
عكس معدل LAR
الذرة: 45-80 درجة مئوية يوم
القمح: 90-110 درجة مئوية يوم
يُستخدم في نماذج محاكاة المحاصيل

all_formulas.name: Daily Light Integral (DLI)
all_formulas.variables:
PPFD = photosynthetic photon flux density (μmol m⁻² s⁻¹)
Photoperiod = hours of light per day
Target: leafy greens 12–17; tomato 20–30 mol/m²/d
all_formulas.purpose: Quantifies total photosynthetically active radiation received in a day; main driver of greenhouse crop yield.
all_formulas.example: PPFD = 250 μmol/m²/s for 16 hours → DLI = 250×3600×16/1,000,000 = 14.4 mol/m²/d.
all_formulas.pitfall: Do not confuse PPFD (instantaneous) with DLI (daily sum).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يُقيس الإشعاع الفوتوسينثتيك النشط المستلم في يوم واحد؛ المحرك الرئيسي لغلة المحاصيل في البيوت المحمية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
PPFD = كثافة تدفق الفوتونات الفوتوسينثتيك (μmol m⁻² s⁻¹)
فترة الضوء = ساعات الضوء في اليوم
الهدف: للخضروات الورقية 12-17؛ الطماطم 20-30 مول/م²/يوم

all_formulas.name: Vapor Pressure Deficit (VPD)
all_formulas.variables:
T = air temperature (°C)
RH = relative humidity (%)
Target: 0.8–1.5 kPa for most crops
all_formulas.purpose: Drives transpiration and stomatal behavior; key climate parameter for greenhouse management.
all_formulas.example: T=22°C, RH=70%: SVP=2.64 kPa → VPD = 2.64×0.30 = 0.79 kPa (low-moderate).
all_formulas.pitfall: High VPD (>2 kPa) causes stomatal closure and yield loss; low VPD (<0.4 kPa) promotes disease.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يُحرك النتح وسلوك الثغور؛ معلمة مناخية أساسية لإدارة البيوت المحمية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
T = درجة حرارة الهواء (°C)
RH = الرطوبة النسبية (%)
الهدف: 0.8-1.5 كيلوباسكال لأغلب المحاصيل

all_formulas.name: CO₂ Enrichment Efficiency (CEE)
all_formulas.formula: CEE = (Yield_enriched − Yield_ambient) / CO₂ added  [kg yield / kg CO₂]
all_formulas.variables:
Ambient CO₂ ≈ 420 ppm; enrichment target 800–1200 ppm for C3 crops
C4 crops (maize, sorghum) do not respond significantly
all_formulas.purpose: Measures economic benefit of CO₂ enrichment against gas cost.
all_formulas.example: Tomato: yield gain 3 kg/m², CO₂ used 0.6 kg/m² → CEE = 5 kg tomato/kg CO₂.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يُقيس الفائدة الاقتصادية لإثراء CO₂ مقابل تكلفة الغاز.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
CO₂ المحيطي ≈ 420 جزء في المليون؛ هدف الإثراء 800-1200 جزء في المليون لمحاصيل C3
محاصيل C4 (الذرة، الذرة الرفيعة) لا تستجيب بشكل كبير

all_formulas.name: Nutrient Solution EC & pH Management
all_formulas.formula: EC target (dS/m) varies by crop growth stage and species
all_formulas.variables:
Seedling: 0.8–1.2 dS/m
Vegetative: 1.5–2.5 dS/m
Fruiting: 2.0–4.0 dS/m
pH target: 5.8–6.2 for most crops
all_formulas.purpose: EC guides nutrient concentration; deviation indicates dilution (overwatering) or buildup (underwatering).
all_formulas.example: EC drops from 2.2 to 1.6 dS/m → plants consuming water faster than nutrients; increase feed concentration.
all_formulas.name_ar: إدارة EC و pH محلول المغذيات
all_formulas.purpose_ar: EC توجه تركيز المغذيات؛ الانحراف يشير إلى التخفيف (سقي مفرط) أو التراكم (سقي ناقص).
all_formulas.variables_ar:
الشتلة: 0.8-1.2 dS/m
النمو الخضري: 1.5-2.5 dS/m
الإثمار: 2.0-4.0 dS/m
الهدف pH: 5.8-6.2 لأغلب المحاصيل

all_formulas.name: Shade Equivalency Ratio (SER)
all_formulas.variables:
SER > 1 = shade-tolerant crop benefits from tree shade
SER < 1 = light competition dominant
all_formulas.purpose: Measures the yield response of an understory crop to tree-induced shade.
all_formulas.example: Coffee under Acacia: 1.8 t/ha vs 1.4 t/ha in full sun → SER = 1.29.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يُقيس استجابة غلة المحصول السفلي الظليل الناتج عن الأشجار.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
SER > 1 = المحصول الظلوم يستفيد من ظل الأشجار
SER < 1 = المنافسة الضووية هي المهيمنة

all_formulas.name: Agroforestry LER (AF-LER)
all_formulas.variables:
Ytree = timber, fruit, or fodder yield from trees
Stree = tree monoculture yield
Sum all components present in system
all_formulas.purpose: Extends the standard LER to include tree products; AF-LER > 1 confirms land use advantage.
all_formulas.example: Timber partial LER=0.6, crop partial LER=0.9 → AF-LER = 1.5 (50% land advantage).
all_formulas.name_ar: كفاءة استخدام الأرض في الزراعة الحرجية (AF-LER)
all_formulas.purpose_ar: توسع LER القياسي لتشمل منتجات الأشجار؛ AF-LER > 1 يؤكد ميزة استخدام الأرض.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Ytree = محصول الخشب، الفاكهة، أو العلف من الأشجار
Stree = محصول الأشجار المزروعة بمفردها
اجمع كل المكونات الموجودة في النظام

all_formulas.name: Carbon Sequestration Rate (CSR)
all_formulas.formula: CSR = ΔC_biomass + ΔC_soil  [t CO₂-eq ha⁻¹ yr⁻¹]
all_formulas.variables:
ΔC_biomass = annual increment in tree + crop biomass C
ΔC_soil = annual change in soil organic C
all_formulas.purpose: Quantifies annual carbon sink of the agroforestry system for climate reporting.
all_formulas.example: Tree biomass C gain = 2.5 t/ha/yr, soil C gain = 0.3 t/ha/yr → CSR = 2.8 t C = 10.3 t CO₂-eq/ha/yr.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يُقيس كمية الكربون المُخزنة سنويًا في نظام الزراعة الحرجية للتقارير المناخية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
ΔC_biomass = الزيادة السنوية في الكربون الحيوي للأشجار + المحصول
ΔC_soil = التغير السنوي في الكربون العضوي في التربة

all_formulas.name: Weight Loss Percentage (WL%)
all_formulas.formula: WL% = (Initial weight − Final weight) / Initial weight × 100
all_formulas.variables:
Measured at specific intervals (7, 14, 30 days)
Include all loss pathways: respiration, moisture, pest damage
all_formulas.purpose: Most basic and universally used post-harvest loss metric.
all_formulas.example: Onions: 50 kg stored, 43 kg after 30 days → WL% = 14%.
all_formulas.pitfall: Distinguish physiological loss (normal) from pathological loss (preventable).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: أكثر مؤشر الفقد بعد الحصاد أساسية واستخدامًا عالميًا.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
يُقاس في فترات محددة (7، 14، 30 يوم)
يشمل جميع مسارات الفقد: التنفس، الرطوبة، أضرار الآفات

all_formulas.name: Respiration Rate (RR)
all_formulas.formula: RR = CO₂ evolved / (Weight × Time)  [mg CO₂ kg⁻¹ h⁻¹]
all_formulas.variables:
Higher RR = faster deterioration
Temperature doubles RR for every 10°C rise (Q₁₀ rule)
Used to predict shelf life
all_formulas.purpose: Measures metabolic rate of fresh produce; higher respiration = faster quality loss.
all_formulas.example: Strawberries at 20°C: 60 mg CO₂/kg/h (high) vs at 4°C: 12 mg CO₂/kg/h (manageable).

all_formulas.name: Q₁₀ Temperature Coefficient
all_formulas.formula: Q₁₀ = (RR at T+10) / (RR at T)  [dimensionless, typically 2–3]
all_formulas.variables:
Q₁₀ ≈ 2 for most fresh produce
Used to estimate storage life extension from cooling
all_formulas.purpose: Quantifies the acceleration of deterioration with temperature; basis for cold chain design.
all_formulas.example: Q₁₀=2.5: cooling from 25°C to 5°C → 2.5² = 6.25× longer shelf life.

all_formulas.name: Safe Storage Moisture Content
all_formulas.formula: EMC equilibrium charts: Grain moisture % where aw < 0.7 prevents mold
all_formulas.variables:
Maize: < 13.5% MC for long-term storage
Wheat: < 13.0%
Rice (paddy): < 14%
Legumes: < 12%
all_formulas.purpose: Critical threshold below which mold growth, mycotoxin production, and insect activity are suppressed.
all_formulas.example: Grain at 15% MC must be dried to 13.5% before hermetic storage to prevent aflatoxin.
all_formulas.pitfall: MC varies with temperature — use temperature-corrected charts.

all_formulas.name: Cold Chain Energy Efficiency (CCEE)
all_formulas.formula: CCEE = Tonnes of product stored × days / Energy consumed (kWh)
all_formulas.variables: Higher = more efficient cold storage
all_formulas.purpose: Evaluates energy cost of cold storage for economic and carbon footprint analysis.
all_formulas.example: 500 t apple store, 150 days, 12,000 kWh → CCEE = 6.25 t·day/kWh.

all_formulas.name: Specific Growth Rate (SGR)
all_formulas.formula: SGR (% BW/day) = (ln W₂ − ln W₁) / (t₂ − t₁) × 100
all_formulas.variables:
W₁, W₂ = initial and final body weight (g)
t = days between weighings
Typical: tilapia 1.5–3.5%/day, shrimp 2–4%/day
all_formulas.purpose: Standard growth metric for aquaculture species; accounts for the exponential nature of fish growth.
all_formulas.example: Tilapia: W₁=50g, W₂=180g, 60 days → SGR = (ln180−ln50)/60×100 = 2.1%/day.
all_formulas.pitfall: Do not use simple ADG for aquaculture — SGR is the industry standard.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: قياس معدل النمو اليومي للأسماك كنسبة مئوية من وزن الجسم.

all_formulas.name: Feed Conversion Ratio (FCR – Aquaculture)
all_formulas.formula: FCR = Feed fed (dry) / Weight gain (wet)  [kg feed/kg fish]
all_formulas.variables:
Best practice: salmon 1.0–1.2; tilapia 1.3–1.8; shrimp 1.5–2.5; catfish 1.5–2.0
Must specify dry feed vs wet feed basis
all_formulas.purpose: Primary efficiency measure; lower FCR = less feed waste and lower nitrogen discharge.
all_formulas.example: Pond: 500 kg feed, 300 kg gain → FCR = 1.67.
all_formulas.pitfall: FCR worsens with poor water quality, disease, or feed quality — investigate root cause.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: كفاءة تحويل العلف الجاف إلى زيادة في الوزن الرطب للأسماك.

all_formulas.name: Survival Rate (SR)
all_formulas.variables:
Shrimp target: >70–80%
Tilapia cage: >90–95%
Salmon marine: >85–92%
all_formulas.purpose: Key indicator of husbandry success, disease management, and water quality control.
all_formulas.example: 50,000 shrimp stocked, 37,000 harvested → SR = 74%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: نسبة الأسماك المحصودة إلى الأسماك المزرعة.

all_formulas.name: Stocking Density & Biomass
all_formulas.formula: Biomass (kg/m³) = Number of fish × Average weight (kg) / Volume (m³)
all_formulas.variables:
Tilapia RAS: 30–80 kg/m³
Salmon net pen: 15–30 kg/m³
Shrimp pond: 0.3–1.0 kg/m³
all_formulas.purpose: Current standing crop; used to determine feeding rate and predict oxygen demand.
all_formulas.example: 2000 tilapia × 0.25 kg / 10 m³ = 50 kg/m³ (at upper limit — monitor DO closely).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب الكتلة الحيوية للماء بناءً على عدد الأسماك ووزنها.

all_formulas.name: Water Quality Index (WQI – Aquaculture)
all_formulas.formula: WQI = Σ(Wi × qi)  where Wi = weight and qi = quality score for each parameter
all_formulas.variables:
Parameters: DO, NH₃, NO₂, pH, Temperature, Turbidity, Alkalinity
DO critical threshold: >5 mg/L for most species
all_formulas.purpose: Composite index of water quality suitable for aquaculture production.
all_formulas.example: Monitor daily DO, weekly nutrients, monthly full WQI.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مؤشر شامل لجودة المياه في أنظمة الاستزراع المائي.

all_formulas.name: Carrying Capacity (CC)
all_formulas.formula: CC = Forage available (kg DM/ha) / (Animal requirement kg DM/day × Grazing days)
all_formulas.variables:
Also expressed as Livestock Units (LSU) per hectare
1 LSU = 450 kg cow consuming 12 kg DM/day
Typical: semi-arid 0.3–0.8 LSU/ha; humid 2–4 LSU/ha
all_formulas.purpose: Maximum animal load a pasture can sustain without degradation.
all_formulas.example: Pasture: 3,500 kg DM/ha, 70% utilization = 2,450 kg available. One LSU needs 12 kg/day × 30 days = 360 kg. CC = 6.8 LSU/ha for one month.
all_formulas.pitfall: Never use full potential — target 60–70% utilization to maintain plant cover.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب الحد الأقصى للوحدات الحيوانية التي يمكن أن ترعى في مساحة معينة.

all_formulas.name: Pasture Growth Rate (PGR)
all_formulas.formula: PGR = (Dry matter at end − Dry matter at start) / Days  [kg DM ha⁻¹ day⁻¹]
all_formulas.variables:
Measured by excluding grazing in a cage
Highly seasonal — varies from 0 (drought) to 100+ kg/ha/day
all_formulas.purpose: Actual daily forage production rate; used to plan rotation timing and supplement programs.
all_formulas.example: Start: 1,200 kg DM/ha, End: 2,800 kg after 21 days → PGR = 76.2 kg DM/ha/day.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: معدل إنتاج العلف اليومي الفعلي؛ يُستخدم للتخطيط لتوقعات الدوران وبرامج المكملات الغذائية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
يُقاس باستثناء الرعي في قفص
موسمي للغاية — يتراوح من 0 (جفاف) إلى 100+ كجم/هكتار/يوم

all_formulas.name: Stocking Rate (SR)
all_formulas.formula: SR = Number of animal units × Days grazed / Hectares grazed  [AU-days/ha]
all_formulas.variables:
AU = animal unit (450 kg beef cow equivalent)
Actual vs recommended SR ratio = grazing pressure
all_formulas.purpose: Expresses grazing intensity; compare to carrying capacity to assess over/understocking.
all_formulas.example: 50 cows (AU=1) on 25 ha for 120 days → SR = 50×120/25 = 240 AU-days/ha.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يعبر عن شدة الرعي؛ يُقارن بالسعة التحملية لتقييم الزيادة أو النقص في الإشغال.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
وحدة الحيوان (AU) = وحدة حيوان مكافئة بقرة لحمية بوزن 450 كجم
نسبة معدل الإشغال الفعلي إلى الموصى به = ضغط الرعي

all_formulas.name: Rotational Grazing Rest Period (RP)
all_formulas.formula: RP = (Target leaf area recovery / PGR) × adjustment factor  [days]
all_formulas.variables:
Warm season grasses: 30–45 day rest
Cool season grasses: 20–35 days
Adjust by season and growth rate
all_formulas.purpose: Time required for pasture to recover adequate leaf area and root reserves before re-grazing.
all_formulas.example: Summer: PGR=60 kg/day, target 2500 kg regrowth → RP ≈ 42 days.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: الزمن المطلوب لاستعادة المراعي لمساحة أوراق كافية واحتياطات الجذر قبل إعادة الرعي.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
العشبات الموسمية الدافئة: راحة 30–45 يوم
العشبات الموسمية الباردة: 20–35 يوم
يُضبط حسب الموسم ومعدل النمو

all_formulas.name: Forage Utilization Efficiency (FUE)
all_formulas.formula: FUE (%) = Forage consumed by animals / Forage grown × 100
all_formulas.variables:
Target: 50–70% for rotational; 30–50% for continuous
Unutilized forage: trampled, rejected, or senesced
all_formulas.purpose: Efficiency of converting forage growth into animal product; key for system profitability.
all_formulas.example: PGR gives 4,000 kg DM/ha, animals consume 2,600 kg → FUE = 65%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: كفاءة تحويل نمو العلف إلى منتج حيواني؛ مفتاح لربحية النظام.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
الهدف: 50–70% للدوران، 30–50% للدوري المستمر
العلف غير المستخدم: مُداس، مرفوض، أو متقدم في العمر

all_formulas.name: Colony Strength Index (CSI)
all_formulas.formula: CSI = (Frames of brood × 2) + Frames of bees + (Frames of stores × 0.5)
all_formulas.variables:
Score out of maximum possible for hive size
Healthy spring colony: CSI > 15 (10-frame hive)
Correlates with honey production potential
all_formulas.purpose: Rapid assessment of colony productive potential without disassembly.
all_formulas.example: 4 brood frames, 8 bee frames, 6 store frames → CSI = 8+8+3 = 19 (strong).
all_formulas.pitfall: Calibrate scoring to local race and season — Africanized colonies build faster.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقييم سريع لإمكانات إنتاجية المستعمرة دون تفكيكها.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
نتيجة من أصل الممكن لخلية النحل
مستعمرة صحية في الربيع: CSI > 15 (خلية 10 إطارات)
يرتبط بإمكانات إنتاج العسل

all_formulas.name: Varroa Mite Infestation Rate (VIR)
all_formulas.purpose: Primary indicator of varroa destructor infestation; key for treatment timing.
all_formulas.example: 9 mites in 300-bee sample → VIR = 3.0% (immediate treatment required).
all_formulas.pitfall: Sample from brood nest bees, not foragers — foragers underestimate infestation.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: المؤشر الرئيسي لإصابة القراد الفارو destructor؛ مفتاح لتوقيت العلاج.

all_formulas.name: Honey Yield per Colony (HY)
all_formulas.formula: HY = Honey harvested (kg) / Number of colonies  [kg/colony]
all_formulas.variables:
World average: 20–25 kg
Intensive managed: 40–80 kg
Depends heavily on forage area and season
all_formulas.purpose: Primary productivity measure for commercial beekeeping operations.
all_formulas.example: 600 kg extracted from 18 colonies → HY = 33.3 kg/colony.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مقياس الإنتاجية الرئيسية لعمليات تربية النحل التجارية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
المتوسط العالمي: 20–25 كجم
إدارة مكثفة: 40–80 كجم
يعتمد بشكل كبير على منطقة العلف والموسم

all_formulas.name: Pollination Service Index (PSI)
all_formulas.formula: PSI = Colony density × Foraging radius × Crop dependence ratio
all_formulas.variables:
Colony density = hives/ha
Foraging radius = effective range (typically 2 km)
Crop dependence: 0 (self-fertile) to 1 (fully dependent)
all_formulas.purpose: Estimates pollination service delivery to a target crop.
all_formulas.example: Almond (dependence=0.65): 2 hives/ha × effective 3 km range → high PSI.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يُقدر تقديم خدمة التلقيح لمحصول مستهدف.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
الكثافة المستعمرة = خلايا/هكتار
نطاق التغذية = المدى الفعلي (عادة 2 كم)
اعتماد المحصول: 0 (ذاتي الإخصاب) إلى 1 (معتمد بالكامل)

all_formulas.name: Temperature-Humidity Index (THI)
all_formulas.variables:
T = dry-bulb temperature (°C)
RH = relative humidity (%)
Dairy cattle: >68 = mild stress; >72 = moderate; >78 = severe
all_formulas.purpose: Single index combining temperature and humidity effects on heat stress in cattle.
all_formulas.pitfall: THI thresholds differ by species: poultry stress begins at THI>75; pigs at THI>70.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مؤشر واحد يجمع تأثير درجة الحرارة والرطوبة على الإجهاد الحراري في الماشية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
T = درجة حرارة الطلق الجاف (°C)
RH = الرطوبة النسبية (%)
بقرة الألبان: >68 = إجهاد خفيف؛ >72 = معتدل؛ >78 = شديد

all_formulas.name: Respiration Rate (RR) as Heat Stress Proxy
all_formulas.formula: Normal: cattle 10–30 breaths/min; Mild stress: 40–60; Severe: >80
all_formulas.variables:
Non-invasive field measurement
Count flank movements for 15 seconds × 4
Most reliable stress indicator in absence of instruments
all_formulas.purpose: Rapid field assessment of heat stress severity without equipment.
all_formulas.example: Cow showing 72 breaths/min on hot day → severe heat stress, shade and water immediately.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقييم سريع في الميدان لشدة الإجهاد الحراري بدون معدات.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
قياس غير جراحي في الميدان
عدد حركات الجانب لمدة 15 ثانية × 4
مؤشر الإجهاد الأكثر موثوقية في غياب الأدوات

all_formulas.name: Body Condition Score Change Rate (BCSCR)
all_formulas.variables:
BCS loss > 1 point in first 60 days post-calving = high NEB risk
Target: < 0.5 BCS loss in transition period
all_formulas.purpose: Tracks rate of energy mobilization from body reserves; key transition management tool.
all_formulas.example: BCS drops from 3.5 to 2.8 in 45 days → BCSCR = −0.016/day (acceptable).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يتتبع معدل تحطيم الطاقة من مخازن الجسم؛ أداة أساسية لإدارة فترة التحول.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
فقدان BCS > 1 نقطة في أول 60 يوم بعد الولادة = مخمر كبير لـ NEB
الهدف: < 0.5 فقدان BCS في فترة التحول

all_formulas.name: Animal Welfare Index (AWI)
all_formulas.formula: AWI = Σ(Domain score × Domain weight) / Total weight  [0–100 scale]
all_formulas.variables:
Domains: nutrition, environment, health, behavior, mental state
Based on Five Freedoms / Five Domains framework
Score > 80 = good welfare
all_formulas.purpose: Composite welfare assessment for certification, insurance, or improvement planning.
all_formulas.example: Score domains 1–5 on 0–20 scale each → sum / 100 for normalized AWI.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقييم شامل لرفاهية الحيوان للأ certificatio، التأمين، أو التخطيط للتحسين.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
المجالات: التغذية، البيئة، الصحة، السلوك، الحالة النفسية
مبني على إطار الأربعينيات / مجالات الخمس
النتيجة > 80 = رفاهية جيدة

all_formulas.name: Root Mean Square Error (RMSE)
all_formulas.formula: RMSE = √(Σ(Predicted − Observed)² / n)  [same units as variable]
all_formulas.variables:
n = number of observations
Lower RMSE = better prediction accuracy
Compare to mean value: RMSE/mean < 10% = excellent
all_formulas.purpose: Most common accuracy metric for continuous predictions (yield, weight, milk production).
all_formulas.example: Yield model: 10 plots, RMSE = 0.45 t/ha vs mean yield 4.2 t/ha → RMSE% = 10.7% (acceptable).
all_formulas.pitfall: RMSE penalizes large errors more than small — better than MAE for outlier-sensitive applications.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مؤشر الدقة الأكثر شيوعًا للتنبؤات المستمرة (المحصول، الوزن، إنتاج الحليب).
all_formulas.variables_ar:
n = عدد المشاهدات
RMSE أقل = دقة تنبؤ أفضل
المقارنة بالقيمة المتوسطة: RMSE/المتوسط < 10% = ممتاز

all_formulas.name: Mean Absolute Error (MAE)
all_formulas.formula: MAE = Σ|Predicted − Observed| / n  [same units as variable]
all_formulas.variables:
More interpretable than RMSE
Equally weights all errors
Compare RMSE/MAE: ratio > 1.2 suggests outliers present
all_formulas.purpose: Average prediction error in original units; easier to explain to non-technical stakeholders.
all_formulas.example: MAE = 0.3 t/ha for yield prediction → on average predictions are within 300 kg/ha.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: متوسط خطأ التنبؤ في الوحدات الأصلية؛ أسهل لشرحه لمستشارين غير تقنيين.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
أكثر قابلية للتفسير من RMSE
يعطي نفس الوزن لجميع الأخطاء
مقارنة RMSE/MAE: النسبة > 1.2 تشير إلى وجود قيم شاذة

all_formulas.name: Confusion Matrix Metrics (Classification)
all_formulas.variables:
TP=true positive, FP=false positive, FN=false negative
Disease detection: prioritize Recall (minimize missed cases)
Weed mapping: prioritize Precision (minimize false spraying)
all_formulas.purpose: Evaluates binary classification models (disease yes/no, pest present/absent).
all_formulas.example: Disease detector: Precision=0.88, Recall=0.91, F1=0.895 → good balanced performance.
all_formulas.pitfall: Accuracy alone is misleading with class imbalance (rare disease = high accuracy by always predicting "no disease").
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يقيّم نماذج التصنيف الثنائي (مرض نعم/لا، آفرة حاضر/غائب).
all_formulas.variables_ar:
TP=إيجابي صحيح، FP=إيجابي خاطئ، FN=سلبي خاطئ
كشف الأمراض: أولوية تذكر (تقليل الحالات المفقودة)
رسم خرائط الأعشاب: أولوية الدقة (تقليل الرش الخاطئ)

all_formulas.name: R² (Coefficient of Determination)
all_formulas.variables:
R² > 0.85 = good model fit for agricultural applications
R² can be negative for poorly fitted models
Always report alongside RMSE — R² alone misleads
all_formulas.purpose: Proportion of variation in the outcome explained by the model.
all_formulas.example: Yield prediction: R²=0.87 → model explains 87% of yield variation.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: النسبة المئوية للتغير في النتيجة المفسر بالنموذج.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
R² > 0.85 = ملاءمة جيدة للنموذج للتطبيقات الزراعية
يمكن أن تكون R² سالبة للنماذج غير الملائمة دائمًا
أبلغ دائمًا مع RMSE — R² وحدها تضليل

all_formulas.name: Ground Sampling Distance (GSD)
all_formulas.formula: GSD (cm/px) = (Altitude m × Sensor width mm) / (Focal length mm × Image width px)
all_formulas.variables:
Lower GSD = higher resolution
Plant counting requires GSD < 2 cm
Canopy cover mapping: GSD < 5 cm sufficient
all_formulas.purpose: Defines the spatial resolution of captured imagery; drives altitude and flight time planning.
all_formulas.example: DJI Phantom 4 Multispectral at 120 m: GSD ≈ 5.3 cm — suitable for NDVI mapping.
all_formulas.pitfall: GSD doubles when altitude doubles — balance coverage speed vs resolution needed.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يحدد الدقة المكانية للصور الملتقطة؛ يدفع تخطيط الارتفاع ووقت الطيران.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
GSD أقل = دقة أعلى
عد النباتات يتطلب GSD < 2 سم
رسم خرائط التغطية النباتية: GSD < 5 سم كافٍ

all_formulas.name: Flight Coverage Rate
all_formulas.variables:
Include turnaround time at field edges
Typical: 15–50 ha/hr for imaging; 5–10 ha/hr for spraying
all_formulas.purpose: Mission planning metric to estimate number of flights and battery requirements.
all_formulas.example: Speed=8 m/s, swath=60 m → Coverage = 8×60×3600/10000 = 172.8 ha/hr (imaging mode).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مؤشر تخطيم المهمة لتقدير عدد الرحلات ومتطلبات البطارية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
تضمين وقت الدوران عند حواف الحقل
المعتاد: 15–50 هكتار/ساعة للتصوير؛ 5–10 هكتار/ساعة للرش

all_formulas.name: Spray Drone Application Rate
all_formulas.formula: Application rate (L/ha) = Flow rate (L/min) × 60 / (Speed m/s × Swath m × 0.36)
all_formulas.variables:
Typical application rate: 10–30 L/ha for spray drones
Ultra-low volume (ULV): 1–3 L/ha for specialized formulations
all_formulas.purpose: Ensures correct pesticide dosage when using spray drones.
all_formulas.example: Flow=1.2 L/min, speed=4 m/s, swath=4 m → Rate = 72/5.76 = 12.5 L/ha.
all_formulas.pitfall: Calibrate flow meter before each field — temperature affects nozzle output.
all_formulas.name_ar: معدل تطبيق رش الطائرات بدون طيار
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يضمن الجرعة الصحيحة من المبيدات عند استخدام طائرات رش بدون طيار.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
معدل التطبيق المعتاد: 10–30 لتر/هكتار لطائرات الرش
حجم منخفض جدًا (ULV): 1–3 لتر/هكتار للصيغ المتخصصة

all_formulas.name: Image Overlap for Orthomosaic
all_formulas.variables:
Higher overlap = better photogrammetry accuracy but more images and processing time
80/70 overlap standard for agricultural mapping
Windy conditions require higher overlap (85/80)
all_formulas.purpose: Ensures sufficient image pairs for photogrammetric reconstruction of orthomap.
all_formulas.example: Field with 85/75 overlap at 5 m/s → approximately 3× more images than 70/60 overlap.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يضمن أزواج صور كافية لإعادة بناء المثلثات الضوئية للمصفوفة الأرضية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
تداخل أعلى = دقة أفضل للمثلثات الضوئية ولكن المزيد من الصور ومعالجة وقت
80/70 تدليل معياري لرسم الخرائط الزراعية
ظروف الرياح تتطلب تداخلًا أعلى (85/80)

all_formulas.name: Sensor Accuracy & Drift
all_formulas.formula: Drift rate = (Reading at time t − Initial calibrated value) / Elapsed days  [units/day]
all_formulas.variables:
Cross-validate against manual measurements monthly
Temperature sensors: acceptable drift < 0.1°C/month
Soil EC sensors: recalibrate when drift >5% detected
all_formulas.purpose: Quantifies systematic sensor error accumulation over time.
all_formulas.example: Soil moisture sensor reads 32%, manual gravimetric = 29% → Error = 3%, consider recalibration.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يقيس تراكم الخطأ المنهجي للمستشعِر بمرور الوقت.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
التحقق المتقاطع مع القياسات اليدوية شهرياً
مستشعرات الحرارة: الانحراف المقبول < 0.1°C/شهر
مستشعرات توصيلية التربة (EC): المعايرة مرة أخرى عند اكتشاف انحراف >5%

all_formulas.name: Data Completeness Index (DCI)
all_formulas.variables:
Target: >95% for critical sensors
<80% indicates connectivity or power problem
Weight by sensor importance for composite DCI
all_formulas.purpose: Measures reliability of sensor data transmission; critical for systems using sensor data for automation.
all_formulas.example: Weather station sends 95 of expected 96 hourly records → DCI = 99.0%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يقيس موثوقية نقل بيانات المستشعِر؛ حاسم للأنظمة التي تستخدم بيانات المستشعِر للتحكم الآلي.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
الهدف: >95% للمستشعرات الحرجة
<80% يشير إلى مشاكل الاتصال أو الطاقة
التسوية حسب أهمية المستشعِر لمؤشر DCI المركب

all_formulas.name: Alert Threshold Setting
all_formulas.formula: Alert Z-score = (Observation − Rolling mean) / Rolling SD
all_formulas.variables:
Z > 2.5 = unusual reading (alert)
Z > 3.5 = sensor fault likely
Window: 7–30 days rolling baseline
all_formulas.purpose: Statistical approach to distinguish genuine anomalies from sensor noise.
all_formulas.example: Soil moisture drops to Z=3.1 → genuine irrigation need or sensor disconnection — investigate.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: نهج إحصائي للتمييز بين الشذوذ الحقيقي والضوضاء في المستشعِر.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Z > 2.5 = قراءة غير عادية (تنبيه)
Z > 3.5 = عطل في المستشعِر على الأرجح
النافذة: خط أساس متحرك لمدة 7–30 يوم

all_formulas.name: Soil Carbon Stock (SCS)
all_formulas.variables:
Multiply by 3.67 to convert C to CO₂-equivalent
Measure in 0–30 cm and 30–100 cm layers separately
all_formulas.purpose: Baseline measurement for soil carbon projects; repeated sampling detects change over time.
all_formulas.pitfall: Ensure same BD sampling method and depth at baseline and monitoring — inconsistency is largest source of error.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: قياس أساس لمشاريع الكربون في التربة؛ يتم أخذ العينات المتكرر لرصد التغير بمرور الوقت.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
اضرب في 3.67 لتحويل C إلى مكافئ CO₂
قياس طبقات 0–30 سم و 30–100 سم بشكل منفصل

all_formulas.name: Annual Soil Carbon Change
all_formulas.variables:
Minimum 2–3 years monitoring before crediting
Typical creditable change: 0.3–1.5 t CO₂-eq/ha/yr for improved management
all_formulas.purpose: Annual carbon sequestration rate eligible for carbon credit generation.
all_formulas.example: SCS change: +2.1 t C/ha over 3 years → ΔC = 0.70 t C/ha/yr = 2.57 t CO₂-eq/ha/yr.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: معدل تخزين الكربون السنوي المؤهل لإنشاء ائتمان الكربون.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
الحد الأدنى 2–3 سنوات من المراقبة قبل الائتمان
التغير المؤهل للائتمان: 0.3–1.5 طن CO₂-مكاف/هكتار/سنة للإدارة المحسنة

all_formulas.name: N₂O Emissions from Fertilizer (IPCC Tier 1)
all_formulas.formula: N₂O (kg N/ha) = N_applied × EF1  where EF1 = 0.01 (1% default)
all_formulas.variables:
Convert to CO₂-eq: × 298 (GWP of N₂O)
Accounts for direct emissions only; add indirect (leaching, volatilization)
EF1 varies 0.003–0.03 regionally
all_formulas.purpose: Default method for estimating direct N₂O emissions from synthetic and organic N applications.
all_formulas.example: 150 kg N/ha urea → N₂O = 1.5 kg N/ha = 2.4 kg N₂O/ha = 711 kg CO₂-eq/ha.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: الطريقة الافتراضية لتقدير انبعاثات N₂O المباشرة من تطبيقات الن العضوي والاصطناعي.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
تحويل إلى CO₂-مكاف: × 298 (قيمة الاحتباس الحراري لـ N₂O)
يأخذ في الاعتبار الانبعاثات المباشرة فقط؛ أضف الانبعاثات غير المباشرة (التصريف، التطاير)
EF1 يتراوح 0.003–0.03 حسب المنطقة

all_formulas.name: Marketing Margin (MM)
all_formulas.formula: MM = Consumer price − Farm-gate price  [per unit or %]
all_formulas.variables:
MM% = (Consumer price − Farm price) / Consumer price × 100
Identify which chain actors capture most value
all_formulas.purpose: Measures the share of final price that does not return to the farmer.
all_formulas.example: Consumer pays $2.50/kg tomato; farmer receives $0.60/kg → MM% = 76% captured by chain.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يقيس حظيرة السعر النهائي التي لا تعود إلى المزارع.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
MM% = (سعر المستهلك − سعر المزرعة) / سعر المستهلك × 100
تحديد أي من المشاركين في السلسلة يمثل أكبر قيمة

all_formulas.name: Farm-Gate Price Ratio (FGPR)
all_formulas.variables:
FGPR < 1 = farmer receiving below reference (market distortion or inefficiency)
FGPR > 1 = premium (quality, certification, proximity)
all_formulas.purpose: Benchmarks local farm prices against reference prices to identify market failures.
all_formulas.example: Maize farm gate: $180/t vs regional reference $220/t → FGPR = 0.82 (18% below reference).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يحدد أسعار المزارع المحلية مقابل الأسعار المرجعية لتحديد حالات فشل السوق.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
FGPR < 1 = المزارع يتقاضي أقل من المرجع (تشويه السوق أو عدم الكفاءة)
FGPR > 1 = متميز (جودة، شهادة، قرب)

all_formulas.name: Value Chain Node Profitability
all_formulas.formula: Node margin = Selling price − Buying price − Processing/transport costs  [per unit]
all_formulas.variables:
Apply to each node: farm → collection → processor → retailer
Identifies bottlenecks and opportunities for vertical integration
all_formulas.purpose: Decomposes value chain margins by actor to reveal distribution of profit.
all_formulas.example: Collector buys at $0.60, sells at $0.90, transport $0.10/kg → Node margin = $0.20/kg.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يفكك هوامش سلسلة القيمة حسب المشارك ليكشف عن توزيع الربح.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
تطبيق على كل عقد: مزرعة → تجميع → معالج → تجزئة
تحديد الاختناقات والفرص للتكامل الرأسي

all_formulas.name: Price Transmission Coefficient (PTC)
all_formulas.variables:
PTC = 1 = perfect transmission (competitive market)
PTC < 0.5 = poor farm price linkage (market power problem)
Estimated via regression of price time series
all_formulas.purpose: Measures how price changes at consumer level are passed back to farmers.
all_formulas.example: Consumer prices rose 20%, farm prices rose 8% → PTC = 0.40 (farmers poorly connected).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يقيس كيفية انتقال تغيرات السعر للمستهلكين إلى المزارعين.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
PTC = 1 = انتقال مثالي (سوق تنافسي)
PTC < 0.5 = ارتباط ضعيف بسعر المزرعة (مشكلة قوة السوق)
يُقدر عبر انحدار سلاسل زمنية للأسعار

all_formulas.name: Coefficient of Variation (CV)
all_formulas.formula: CV (%) = (Standard deviation of yield / Mean yield) × 100
all_formulas.variables:
CV < 15% = low risk crop/variety
CV 15–25% = moderate risk
CV > 25% = high risk — consider insurance or diversification
all_formulas.purpose: Measures yield variability relative to the mean; primary risk assessment metric.
all_formulas.example: 10-year maize: mean=4.2 t/ha, SD=0.84 → CV = 20% (moderate variability).
all_formulas.pitfall: Use at least 10 years of data for reliable CV estimation.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يقيس تغيرية المحصول بالنسبة للمتوسط؛ مقياس أساسي لتقييم المخاطر.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
CV < 15% = محصول/صنف منخفض المخاطر
CV 15–25% = مخاطر متوسطة
CV > 25% = مخاطر عالية — التفكير في التأمين أو التنويع

all_formulas.name: Value at Risk (VaR)
all_formulas.variables:
Assumes normal distribution of yields
1.645 SD = 95th percentile loss threshold
Reports worst expected yield in 1-in-20 years
all_formulas.purpose: Worst-case yield in a 1-in-20 year scenario; key for lender and insurer risk assessment.
all_formulas.example: Mean=4.2, SD=0.84 → VaR(95%) = 4.2−1.38 = 2.82 t/ha (worst 5% of years).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: أسوأ حالة لمحصول في سيناريو واحد من بين عشرين عامًا؛ مفتاح لتقييم المخاطر من قبل المقرضين والمؤمنين.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
يفترض توزيع طبيعي للمحاصيل
1.645 الانحراف المعياري = عتبة الخسارة في المئوية 95
يبلغ عن أسوأ محصول متوقع في حالة من بين عشرين عامًا

all_formulas.name: Insurance Premium Rate
all_formulas.formula: Premium rate (%) = Expected loss / Sum insured × Loading factor
all_formulas.variables:
Expected loss = mean shortfall below threshold × probability
Loading factor: 1.1–1.4 (insurer expenses + profit)
Index insurance: uses rainfall or NDVI trigger not actual loss
all_formulas.purpose: Actuarially fair premium basis for crop insurance product design.
all_formulas.example: Expected loss = $200/ha, sum insured = $1,000/ha, loading 1.2 → Premium = 24%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: أسعار أقساط عادلة تأمينياً لمنتجات تأمين المحاصيل.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
الخسارة المتوقعة = متوسط النقص عن الحد الأدنى × الاحتمال
عامل التحميل: 1.1–1.4 (النفقات الربحية + أرباح شركة التأمين)
التأمين المؤشر: يستخدم محفزات الأمطار أو NDVI وليس الخسارة الفعلية

all_formulas.name: Basis Risk (Index Insurance)
all_formulas.formula: Basis risk = Correlation between index trigger and actual loss  [R²]
all_formulas.variables:
R² > 0.70 = acceptable basis risk for index insurance
High basis risk = farmers experience loss but do not receive payout
all_formulas.purpose: Key metric for evaluating index-based insurance product quality.
all_formulas.example: Rainfall index vs yield loss R²=0.62 → moderate basis risk, consider spatial refinement.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مقياس أساسي لتقييم جودة منتجات التأمين القائمة على المؤشرات.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
R² > 0.70 = مخاطر أساسية مقبولة للتأمين المؤشر
مخاطر أساسية عالية = المزارعون يواجهون خسائر ولكنهم لا يحصلون على تعويض

all_formulas.name: Economic Water Productivity (EWP)
all_formulas.formula: EWP = Gross value of production / Volume of water consumed  [$/m³]
all_formulas.variables: Includes both irrigation and effective rainfall
all_formulas.purpose: Links water use to economic output; guides crop selection in water-limited environments.
all_formulas.example: Tomato: $3,000/ha value, 4,500 m³/ha water → EWP = $0.67/m³.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يربط استخدام المياه بالنتاج الاقتصادي؛ يوجه اختيار المحاصيل في البيئات المحدودة بالمياه.
all_formulas.variables_ar: يشمل الري وهطول الأمطار الفعال

all_formulas.name: Shadow Price of Water (SPW)
all_formulas.formula: SPW = Marginal increase in profit / Marginal increase in water  [$/m³]
all_formulas.variables:
Derived from linear programming or production function estimation
Represents true economic value of water in production
all_formulas.purpose: Reflects opportunity cost of water; used for pricing and allocation decisions.
all_formulas.example: Profit increases $400/ha with additional 800 m³ irrigation → SPW = $0.50/m³.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يعكس التكلفة الفرصة البديلة للمياه؛ تُستخدم لاتخاذ قرارات التسعية والتخصيص.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
مشتق من البرمجة الخطية أو تقدير دالة الإنتاج
يمثل القيمة الاقتصادية الحقيقية للمياه في الإنتاج

all_formulas.name: Groundwater Depletion Rate (GDR)
all_formulas.formula: GDR = Extraction rate − Recharge rate  [m³/yr or mm/yr]
all_formulas.variables:
Positive GDR = unsustainable extraction
Monitor water table depth over time
Aquifer-specific safe yield estimates needed
all_formulas.purpose: Identifies mining of groundwater beyond sustainable yield; critical for long-term planning.
all_formulas.example: Extraction 250 mm/yr, recharge 80 mm/yr → GDR = 170 mm/yr depletion.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يحدد استنزاف المياه الجوفية ما دون الإنتاج المستدام؛ حاسم للتخطيط طويل الأمد.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
GDR موجب = استخلاص غير مستدام
مراقبة عمق مستوى المياه الجوفية بمرور الوقت
تتقدرات الإنتاج الآمن المحددة للمخزن المائي ضرورية

all_formulas.name: Women's Empowerment in Agriculture Index (WEAI)
all_formulas.variables:
5DE = 5 Domains of Empowerment score (0–1)
GPI = Gender Parity Index
Score > 0.8 = empowered; < 0.6 = disempowered
all_formulas.purpose: USAID/IFPRI tool measuring women's agency, resources, and leadership in agriculture.
all_formulas.example: Five domains: production decisions, resources, income, leadership, time allocation.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: أداة USAID/IFPRI لقياس الوكالة والموارد والقيادة للمرأة في الزراعة.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
5DE = درجة مجالات التمكين الخمسة (0–1)
GPI = مؤشر المساواة بين الجنسين
النتيجة > 0.8 = متمكنة؛ < 0.6 = غير متمكنة

all_formulas.name: Labor Productivity
all_formulas.formula: Labor productivity = Gross output value / Total labor hours (paid + unpaid)
all_formulas.variables:
Disaggregate by gender, age, task type
Compare across farm types and regions
all_formulas.purpose: Measures output per labor unit; reveals efficiency gaps and unpaid labor burdens.
all_formulas.example: Farm output $5,000, 800 labor hours → LP = $6.25/hr.
all_formulas.pitfall: Capture unpaid family labor in time-use surveys — commonly underestimated by 40–60%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يقيس النواتج لكل وحدة عمل؛ يكشف الفجوات الكفاءة والأعباء غير المدفوعة الأجر للعمل.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
تفكيك حسب الجنس والعمر ونوع المهمة
المقارنة بين أنواع المزارع والمناطق

all_formulas.name: Household Food Security Score (HFSS)
all_formulas.formula: HFSS = Σ(Dietary diversity score + Food access score + Stability score) / 3
all_formulas.variables:
Based on FIES (Food Insecurity Experience Scale) or HDDS (Household Dietary Diversity Score)
Scores: 1–8 food groups = better diversity
FIES severe: < 3 groups regularly consumed
all_formulas.purpose: Composite household food security and nutrition adequacy assessment.
all_formulas.example: Score 4 food groups regularly → moderate food security.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقييم مركب للأمن الغذائي والتغذية المنزلية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
يعتمد على FIES (مقياس تجربة انعدام الأمن الغذائي) أو HDDS (مقياس التنوع الغذائي المنزلي)
النتائج: 1–8 مجموعات غذائية = تنوع أفضل
FIE شديد: < 3 مجموعات استهلكت بانتظام

all_formulas.name: Leaching Requirement for Reclamation (LR)
all_formulas.variables:
ECiw = EC of irrigation water (dS/m)
ECe_threshold = maximum tolerable soil EC for crop (dS/m)
LR expressed as fraction of irrigation water that must drain
