all_formulas.purpose: Fraction of applied water needed to leach salt below root zone to achieve target ECe.
all_formulas.example: ECiw=2.0 dS/m, ECe threshold for wheat=6.0: LR = 2/(30−2) = 0.071 (7.1% of applied water must drain).
all_formulas.pitfall: Does not account for rainfall contribution to leaching — subtract effective rainfall from leaching need.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب كمية المياه الإضافية اللازمة لغسيل الأملاح من التربة.

all_formulas.name: Gypsum Requirement (GR)
all_formulas.variables:
ESP = exchangeable sodium percentage (%)
CEC = cation exchange capacity (cmol/kg)
BD = bulk density (g/cm³), depth in cm
1.72 = conversion factor for CaSO₄·2H₂O purity
all_formulas.purpose: Tonnes of gypsum needed to replace sodium on exchange sites to reach target ESP.
all_formulas.example: ESP_i=25%, ESP_t=10%, CEC=20, BD=1.3, depth=30cm → GR ≈ 7.2 t/ha.
all_formulas.pitfall: Account for gypsum purity (commercial grades: 70–95% CaSO₄·2H₂O).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب كمية الجبس اللازمة لاستصلاح الترب الصودية.

all_formulas.name: Relative Yield under Salinity (Threshold-Slope Model)
all_formulas.formula: RY (%) = 100 − b × (ECe − ECe_threshold)  when ECe > threshold
all_formulas.variables:
ECe_threshold = salinity at which yield begins to decline (dS/m)
b = slope (% yield loss per dS/m above threshold)
RY = 100% below threshold; decreases linearly above
all_formulas.purpose: Van Genuchten-Hoffman model predicting crop yield loss from soil salinity.
all_formulas.pitfall: Threshold and slope values are crop- and cultivar-specific — use published tables.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقدير الإنتاج النسبي للمحاصيل تحت ظروف الملوحة.

all_formulas.name: Salt Balance Equation
all_formulas.variables:
Salt_in = ECiw × Volume applied × 0.64 (converts dS/m·m³ to kg salt)
Target: ΔSalt ≤ 0 for sustainable irrigated agriculture
Monitor seasonal salt balance; reclamation needed if positive
all_formulas.purpose: Annual audit of salt inputs vs outputs in an irrigated field.
all_formulas.example: ECiw=1.5 dS/m, 6000 m³/ha applied → Salt_in = 5,760 kg/ha. Must drain ≥5,760 kg to balance.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب ميزان الأملاح في التربة بين المدخلات والمخرجات.

all_formulas.name: Nitrogen Fixation Credit (NFC)
all_formulas.formula: NFC (kg N/ha) = Biomass DM × N% × Ndfa fraction
all_formulas.variables:
Ndfa = proportion of N derived from atmosphere (0.6–0.9 for well-nodulated legumes)
Biomass N from lab analysis or default values
Credit available to following cash crop after decomposition
all_formulas.purpose: Nitrogen contribution of legume cover crop to the following crop, reducing synthetic N need.
all_formulas.example: Vetch: 4 t DM/ha, 3.5% N, Ndfa=0.75 → NFC = 4×35×0.75 = 105 kg N/ha.
all_formulas.pitfall: Only a fraction (30–60%) mineralizes in the same season — adjust timing accordingly.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب كمية النيتروجين التي تثبتها المحاصيل البقولية.

all_formulas.name: Biomass Production Index (BPI)
all_formulas.formula: BPI = Cover crop DM (kg/ha) / Days of growth
all_formulas.variables:
Higher BPI = faster biomass accumulation
Compare species and management options
Minimum: 2,000 kg DM/ha for effective soil coverage
all_formulas.purpose: Productivity rate of cover crop; used to compare species and optimize termination timing.
all_formulas.example: Cereal rye: 3,800 kg DM in 90 days → BPI = 42.2 kg/ha/day.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: قياس معدل إنتاج الكتلة الحيوية اليومي للمحاصيل الغطائية.

all_formulas.name: Rotation Diversity Index (RDI)
all_formulas.formula: RDI = 1 − Σ(pi²)  where pi = proportion of rotation occupied by crop i
all_formulas.variables:
Adapted from Simpson diversity index
RDI = 0 (monoculture) to approaching 1 (maximum diversity)
Minimum RDI of 0.5 recommended for sustainable rotations
all_formulas.purpose: Measures crop sequence diversity; higher RDI associated with lower disease pressure and better soil health.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: قياس تنوع المحاصيل في الدورة الزراعية.

all_formulas.name: Soil Cover Percentage (SCP)
all_formulas.formula: SCP (%) = Covered area / Total area × 100  (measured by point-quadrat or image analysis)
all_formulas.variables:
Target: >70% during critical rainfall erosion periods
Below 30% = unprotected soil, high erosion risk
all_formulas.purpose: Proportion of soil surface protected by living or dead mulch; key erosion protection metric.
all_formulas.example: Count 50 points: 38 covered → SCP = 76% (adequate protection).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب نسبة المساحة المغطاة بالغطاء النباتي.

all_formulas.name: Germination Index (GI)
all_formulas.formula: GI = Σ(Gt / Dt)  where Gt = seeds germinated on day t, Dt = days from start
all_formulas.variables:
Higher GI = faster, more uniform germination
Sensitive to seed lot differences that standard germination misses
all_formulas.purpose: Combines speed and uniformity of germination into a single index.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: قياس سرعة وانتظام إنبات البذور.

all_formulas.name: Seedling Vigour Index (SVI)
all_formulas.formula: SVI = (Shoot length + Root length) mm × Germination %  / 100
all_formulas.variables:
Measured at end of standard germination test (7–10 days)
SVI > 1500 = high vigour; < 500 = poor vigour
all_formulas.purpose: Combines seedling size and germination rate; predicts field emergence better than germination alone.
all_formulas.example: Shoot=65mm, Root=80mm, Germination=88% → SVI = 145×0.88 = 127.6 (moderate).
all_formulas.pitfall: Standardize growth media, temperature, and measurement method between comparisons.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقييم قوة بادرات البذور بناءً على الطول ونسبة الإنبات.

all_formulas.name: Mean Germination Time (MGT)
all_formulas.variables:
ti = time in days
ni = number germinating on day ti
Lower MGT = faster germination
all_formulas.purpose: Average time to germination; lower is better for field crop establishment.
all_formulas.example: Seeds germinate on days 3,4,5: 20,50,30 seeds → MGT=(3×20+4×50+5×30)/100 = 4.1 days.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: متوسط وقت الإنبات؛ الأقل هو الأفضل لتأسيس المحصول في الحقل.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
ti = الوقت بالأيام
ni = عدد البذور المنبتة في اليوم ti
MGT الأقل = إنبات أسرع

all_formulas.name: Emergence Rate Index (ERI)
all_formulas.formula: ERI = Σ(ni × k / ti)  where k = number of counting periods
all_formulas.variables:
Similar to GI but field-based
Higher ERI = faster field establishment
all_formulas.purpose: Field version of germination index; measures speed of crop emergence under actual conditions.
all_formulas.example: Count at 7, 10, 14 days post-sowing with k=3 counting periods.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: نسخة حقلية لمؤشر الإنبات؛ يقيس سرعة ظهور المحصول في الظروف الفعلية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
مشابه لـ GI لكنه قائم على الحقل
مؤشر ERI الأعلى = تأسيس أسرع في الحقل

all_formulas.name: Radiation Use Efficiency (RUE)
all_formulas.formula: RUE = Aboveground biomass / Intercepted PAR  [g DM / MJ]
all_formulas.variables:
PAR = photosynthetically active radiation (400–700 nm)
Intercepted PAR = incoming PAR × (1 − e^(−k × LAI))
Typical values: wheat 1.2–1.8, maize 1.5–2.0, soybean 0.9–1.4 g/MJ
all_formulas.purpose: Core efficiency parameter in radiation-driven crop models; varies by species, N status, and water stress.
all_formulas.example: Maize: 15 t DM/ha over season, intercepted PAR = 900 MJ/m² → RUE = 150/900 = 1.67 g/MJ.
all_formulas.pitfall: RUE declines under water, N, or heat stress — use as a diagnostic of limiting factors.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: معامل الكفاءة الأساسي في نماذج المحصول المدفوعة بالإشعاع؛ يختلف حسب النوع، وحالة النيتروجين، وضغط الماء.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
PAR = الإشعاع الفوتوسينثي الفعال (400–700 نانومتر)
PAR المعترض = PAR الوارد × (1 − e^(−k × LAI))
القيم النموذجية: القمح 1.2–1.8، الذرة 1.5–2.0، فول الصويا 0.9–1.4 غ/مج

all_formulas.name: Transpiration Efficiency Coefficient (TEC)
all_formulas.formula: TE = Biomass produced / Water transpired  [g DM / kg H₂O]  or  [kg / mm]
all_formulas.variables:
TEC relates to vapour pressure deficit: TE × VPD ≈ constant for a species
C4 crops (maize): TEC ≈ 8–12; C3 crops (wheat): TEC ≈ 4–8
all_formulas.purpose: Links water use to biomass production; used in water-limited model simulations.
all_formulas.example: Wheat: 8 t DM/ha, 300 mm transpired → TE = 80/300 = 0.27 kg DM/mm.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يربط استخدام الماء بالإنتاج البيولوجي؛ يُستخدم في محاكيات النماذج المحدودة بالماء.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
TEC يتعلق بعجز ضغط البخار: TE × VPD ≈ ثابت لنوع معين
محاصيل C4 (الذرة): TEC ≈ 8–12؛ محاصيل C3 (القمح): TEC ≈ 4–8

all_formulas.name: Yield Gap Analysis
all_formulas.formula: Yield gap = Potential yield − Actual yield  [t/ha]
all_formulas.variables:
Potential yield = water + nutrient unlimited, pest free (radiation limited only)
Water-limited yield = nutrient unlimited, pest free
Actual yield = farmer field average
all_formulas.purpose: Decomposes the gap between what farmers achieve and what is physically possible.
all_formulas.example: Wheat: potential=10 t/ha, water-limited=7 t/ha, actual=3.5 t/ha → Exploitable gap = 3.5 t/ha.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يحلل الفجوة بين ما يحققه المزارع وما هو ممكن فيزيائياً.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
الإنتاجية المحتملة = محدودة بالماء والعناصر الغذائية، خالية من الآفات (محدودة بالإشعاع فقط)
الإنتاجية المحدودة بالماء = محدودة بالمياه، غير محدودة بالعناصر الغذائية، خالية من الآفات
الإنتاجية الفعلية = متوسط حقول المزارعين

all_formulas.name: Root Colonization Index (RCI)
all_formulas.formula: RCI (%) = Colonized root segments / Total root segments examined × 100
all_formulas.variables:
Gridline intersect or magnified root staining method
Target: >50% for effective mycorrhizal benefit
Arbuscular mycorrhizal fungi (AMF): look for hyphae, vesicles, arbuscules
all_formulas.purpose: Proportion of root system colonized by mycorrhizal fungi; indicates potential P and water uptake benefit.
all_formulas.example: Examine 100 root segments: 64 show AMF structures → RCI = 64%.
all_formulas.pitfall: High P fertilization suppresses AMF colonization — monitor when reducing inputs.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: نظام الجذر المستعمَر بالفطريات الميكوريزية؛ يشير إلى الفائدة المحتملة في امتص الفوسفور والماء.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
طريقة تقاطع الشبكة أو صبغ الجذور المكبرة
الهدف: >50% للفائدة الفطرية الميكوريزية الفعالة
الفطريات الميكوريزية الوشيعية (AMF): ابحث عن الخيوط، الجراب، الجذور

all_formulas.name: Nitrogen Fixation Efficiency (NFE)
all_formulas.formula: NFE = Shoot N in inoculated / Shoot N in uninoculated (no N fertilizer control)
all_formulas.variables:
NFE > 1.5 indicates effective fixation
Measure at peak vegetative stage
Nodule count and colour also diagnostic (pink/red = active)
all_formulas.purpose: Compares N accumulation of inoculated vs uninoculated legumes without fertilizer N.
all_formulas.example: Inoculated soybean: 180 kg N/ha; control: 90 kg N/ha → NFE = 2.0 (excellent fixation).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يقارن تراكم النيتروجين في البقوليات المُلقَّحة مقابل غير المُلقَّحة بدون سماد نيتروجيني.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
NFE > 1.5 يشير إلى تثبيت فعال
يُقاس في مرحلة النمو الخضري ذروة
عدد وتلون العقد الجذرية تشخيصيان أيضاً (وردي/أحمر = نشط)

all_formulas.name: Mycorrhizal Dependency (MD)
all_formulas.formula: MD (%) = (Yield with AMF − Yield without AMF) / Yield with AMF × 100
all_formulas.variables:
High MD = crop highly dependent on AMF for growth
Cassava MD ≈ 80–95%; maize ≈ 20–40%; barley ≈ 10–30%
all_formulas.purpose: Crop-level requirement for AMF; guides inoculant prioritization by crop species.
all_formulas.example: Cassava with AMF: 12 t/ha; without: 4 t/ha → MD = (12−4)/12×100 = 67%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: متطلبات المستوى المحصولي للفطريات الميكوريزية؛ توجه أولويات اللقاح حسب نوع المحصول.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
MD مرتفع = المحصول يعتمد بشدة على الفطريات الميكوريزية للنمو
الكاسافا MD ≈ 80–95%؛ الذرة ≈ 20–40%؛ الشعير ≈ 10–30%

all_formulas.name: Acetate:Propionate Ratio (A:P)
all_formulas.formula: A:P = Molar proportion of acetate / Molar proportion of propionate
all_formulas.variables:
A:P = 3:1 typical for high-forage diet; 2:1 for high-concentrate
A:P < 2.2 = risk of sub-acute ruminal acidosis (SARA)
Acetate → fat; Propionate → glucose
all_formulas.purpose: Reflects fermentation pattern and energy substrate supply; shifts with diet composition.
all_formulas.example: Rumen fluid: acetate 65mol%, propionate 20mol%, butyrate 15mol% → A:P = 3.25.
all_formulas.pitfall: Sample via rumenocentesis or stomach tube — timing relative to feeding affects values.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يعكس نمو التخمير وتوريد الطاقة؛ يتغير مع تكوين العلف.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
A:P = 3:1 نموذجي لنظام عالي الألياف؛ 2:1 لنظام عالي المركز
A:P < 2.2 = خطر الحموضة الحشوية الحادة (SARA)
الأسيتات → دهن؛ البروبيونات → جلوكوز

all_formulas.name: Effective NDF (eNDF)
all_formulas.formula: eNDF (% of diet DM) = NDF% × Physical effectiveness factor (pef)
all_formulas.variables:
pef = 1.0 for long forage; 0.5–0.8 for chopped; 0.2–0.4 for TMR grains
Minimum eNDF: 22% of diet DM for dairy cows
Below minimum → SARA risk, fat depression
all_formulas.purpose: NDF adjusted for particle size effect on rumen mat and chewing stimulation.
all_formulas.example: Silage NDF=40%, pef=0.8 → contributes 32% eNDF; grain NDF=10%, pef=0.2 → 2% eNDF.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: الألياف اللاذمة (NDF) معدلة لتأثير حجم الجسيم على كومة الحيوانات المجترة ومحفز المضغ.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
pef = 1.0 للأعلاف الطويلة؛ 0.5–0.8 للمفرومة؛ 0.2–0.4 للحبوب في نظام TMR
الحد الأدنى لـ eNDF: 22% من علف DM للأبقار الحليبة
أقل من الحد الأدنى → خطر SARA، انخفاض الدهن

all_formulas.name: Neutral Detergent Fiber Digestibility (NDFD)
all_formulas.formula: NDFD (%) = (NDF consumed − NDF in feces) / NDF consumed × 100
all_formulas.variables:
30-hour NDFD most used (in vitro): benchmark >55% for good forages
Higher NDFD → more energy from same NDF level
Drives DMI differences between forage sources
all_formulas.purpose: True digestibility of fiber fraction; major driver of dairy cow energy intake and yield.
all_formulas.example: Forage A: NDFD=62% (excellent); Forage B: NDFD=45% (poor) → choose A for dairy.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: هضم حقيقي لجزء الألياف؛ المحرك الرئيسي لاستهلاك الطاقة وعائد البقرة الحلوب.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
يُستخدم NDFD لمدة 30 ساعة (in vitro) بشكل أساسي: المعيار >55% للأعلاف الجيدة
ارتفاع NDFD → طاقة أكثر من نفس مستوى NDF
يحدد الفروق في استهلاك العلف بين مصادر الأعلاف المختلفة

all_formulas.name: Sub-Acute Ruminal Acidosis Risk Index (SARA-RI)
all_formulas.formula: SARA-RI = Hours per day rumen pH < 5.8
all_formulas.variables:
SARA diagnosed when pH < 5.8 for > 3 hours/day
Measured by continuous bolus pH loggers or spot rumenocentesis
Risk increases with high starch, low eNDF, rapid diet transition
all_formulas.purpose: Quantifies acidosis exposure time; defines SARA threshold for management intervention.
all_formulas.example: pH logger shows 4.5 hrs below 5.8 → SARA confirmed, increase buffer and forage particle size.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يحدد وقت التعرض للحموضة؛ يعرّف عتبة SARA للتدبير الإداري.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
يُشخص SARA عندما يكون الرقم الهيدروجيني < 5.8 لمدة > 3 ساعات/يوم
يُقاس بواسطة مسجل pH مستمر أو بخزنة الحوم العشوائية
يزيد الخطر مع النشا العالي، eNDF المنخفض، الانتقال السريع في النظام الغذائي

all_formulas.name: Litter Size Index (LSI)
all_formulas.formula: LSI = Total lambs/kids born alive / Total ewes/does that lambed
all_formulas.variables:
Prolific breeds (Romanov, Booroola): LSI > 2.0
Merino: LSI 1.1–1.3; Dorper: 1.4–1.6
Does (goats) typically higher than ewes: 1.6–2.2
all_formulas.purpose: Average number of offspring per parturition; key breeding selection and nutritional management metric.
all_formulas.example: 100 ewes lamb, 148 lambs born alive → LSI = 1.48.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: متوسط عدد الأبناء لكل ولادة؛ مقياس رئيسي للاختيار التوليدي وإدارة التغذية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
سلالات الخصوبة (رومانوف، بورولا): LSI > 2.0
ميرينو: LSI 1.1–1.3؛ دوربر: 1.4–1.6
الماعز (الماعز) عادة ما يكون أعلى من النعاج: 1.6–2.2

all_formulas.name: Fleece Weight & Fiber Quality Index
all_formulas.formula: Clean fleece weight (kg) = Greasy fleece × (100 − Vegetable matter% − Grease%) / 100
all_formulas.variables:
Fiber diameter in microns: superfine <17μm; fine 17–19; medium 23–26; strong >30μm
Comfort factor = % fibers < 30μm (target >95% for next-to-skin wear)
all_formulas.purpose: Clean wool yield and quality assessment for Merino and wool breed management.
all_formulas.example: Greasy fleece 5.5 kg, 18% grease, 5% VM → Clean fleece = 5.5×0.77 = 4.24 kg.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقييم العائد الجاف والجودة لصوف ميرينو وإدارة سلالات الصوف.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
قطر الألياف بالميكرون: فائق الدقة <17μm؛ دقيق 17–19؛ متوسط 23–26؛ قوي >30μm
عامل الراحة = % الألياف < 30μm (الهدف >95% للملابس التي تلامس الجلد)

all_formulas.name: Milk-to-Liveweight Ratio (MLR) — Dairy Goats
all_formulas.formula: MLR = Daily milk yield (kg) / Doe body weight (kg)
all_formulas.variables:
High-producing Saanen does: MLR 0.08–0.12
Alpine: 0.07–0.10
Used to compare breeds of different body size
all_formulas.purpose: Size-corrected milk production measure for dairy goat breed comparison.
all_formulas.example: Saanen doe: 4.5 kg/day, BW=65 kg → MLR = 0.069.
all_formulas.name_ar: نسبة الحليب إلى الوزن الحي (MLR) — الماعز الحلوب
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مقياس إنتاج الحليب المصحح حسب الحجم لمقارنة سلالات الماعز الحلوب.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
ماعز سانين المُنتِجة بكثافة: MLR 0.08–0.12
ألباين: 0.07–0.10
يُستخدم لمقارنة سلالات بأحجام جسم مختلفة

all_formulas.name: Substrate Conversion Efficiency (SCE)
all_formulas.formula: SCE (%) = Larval fresh weight gained / Substrate DM offered × 100
all_formulas.variables:
BSF: SCE 10–25% on organic waste substrates
Higher SCE on high-quality substrates (restaurant waste, brewery grains)
Different from FCR — substrate is often waste, not purpose-grown feed
all_formulas.purpose: Efficiency of converting organic substrate into insect biomass; key economic and environmental metric.
all_formulas.example: BSF larvae: 8 kg fresh weight from 50 kg substrate DM → SCE = 16%.
all_formulas.pitfall: SCE varies hugely with substrate quality — always report substrate composition.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: كفاءة تحويل الركيزة العضوية إلى كتلة الحشرات؛ مقياس اقتصادي وبيئي رئيسي.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
ذبابة الفول: SCE 10–25% على ركائز النفايات العضوية
كفاءة SCE أعلى على الركائع عالية الجودة (نفايات المطاعم، حبوب البيرة)
تختلف عن FCR — الركيزة غالبًا ما تكون نفايات، وليس غذاءً مُنَمَّىً

all_formulas.name: Insect Feed Conversion Ratio (iFCR)
all_formulas.formula: iFCR = Feed DM consumed / Insect DM gained  [kg/kg]
all_formulas.variables:
BSF on optimized diet: iFCR 1.4–2.0
Mealworm: iFCR 2.2–3.5
Cricket: iFCR 1.7–2.5
Compare on DM basis to avoid moisture content errors
all_formulas.purpose: Dry matter efficiency of feed conversion; allows cross-species comparison.
all_formulas.example: Mealworm: 100 kg feed DM, 35 kg insect DM gained → iFCR = 2.86.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: كفاءة تحويل المادة الجافة للغذاء؛ يسمح بالمقارنة عبر الأنواع.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
ذبابة الفول على نظام غذائي محسّن: iFCR 1.4–2.0
دودة العmealworm: iFCR 2.2–3.5
جراد الأرز: iFCR 1.7–2.5
المقارنة على أساس DM لتجنب أخطاء محتوى الرطوبة

all_formulas.name: Larval Yield Percentage (LY%)
all_formulas.formula: LY% = Harvest fresh weight / Total rearing unit biomass at peak × 100
all_formulas.variables:
Accounts for mortality during rearing
BSF target: >75% survival from egg to harvest
all_formulas.purpose: Overall biological efficiency of the rearing cycle from egg/neonate to harvest.
all_formulas.example: 500g eggs → expected maximum 20 kg larvae; achieved 16 kg → LY% = 80%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: الكفاءة البيولوجية الإجمالية لدورة التربية من البيضة/اليرقة الطفيفة إلى الحصاد.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
يأخذ في الاعتبار الوفيات أثناء التربية
هدف ذبابة الفول: >75% بقاء من البيضة إلى الحصاد

all_formulas.name: Frass Fertilizer Value
all_formulas.variables:
BSF frass: ~2.5–4% N, 1.5–2.5% P₂O₅, 1.8–2.5% K₂O
Organic N — slower release than synthetic
Value as fertilizer partially offsets production cost
all_formulas.purpose: Economic and agronomic value of insect excrement and substrate residue as fertilizer.
all_formulas.example: BSF frass with 3% N → 300 kg N equivalent per tonne frass.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: القيمة الاقتصادية والزراعية لبراز الحشرات وفض الركيزة كسماد.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
فضلات ذبابة الفول: ~2.5–4% N، 1.5–2.5% P₂O₅، 1.8–2.5% K₂O
N عضوي — أبطأ إطلاق من الاصطناعي
القيمة كسماد تعوض جزئيًا عن تكلفة الإنتاج

all_formulas.name: Heart Rate Recovery Index (HRRI)
all_formulas.formula: HRRI = Resting HR / HR at 10 minutes post-exercise × 100
all_formulas.variables:
Fit horse recovers to <60 bpm within 10 min
HRRI > 80 = excellent fitness; < 60 = poor recovery
Used in endurance events as fitness qualification criterion
all_formulas.purpose: Speed of cardiovascular recovery after exercise; standard fitness assessment metric.
all_formulas.example: Resting HR=40 bpm, HR at 10 min=52 bpm → HRRI = 77 (good fitness).
all_formulas.pitfall: Dehydration and electrolyte imbalance impair recovery — assess alongside gut sounds.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: سرعة استرداد القلب والأوعية الدموية بعد التمرين؛ مقياس معياري لتقييم اللياقة.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
الحصان الليتع يستعيد إلى <60 نبضة/دقيقة خلال 10 دقائق
HRRI > 80 = لياقة ممتازة؛ < 60 = استرداد سيء
يُستخدم في أحداث التحمل كمعيار مؤهل لللياقة

all_formulas.name: Stride Length & Frequency
all_formulas.variables:
Elite thoroughbred: stride length 6.5–7.0 m, frequency 2.2–2.4 Hz at gallop
Stride length more trainable than frequency
Used in biomechanical gait analysis for lameness and optimization
all_formulas.purpose: Decomposes speed into its two biomechanical components for training and soundness assessment.
all_formulas.example: Horse at 16 m/s: stride length=6.8m → frequency = 16/6.8 = 2.35 strides/s.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب سرعة الحيوان من طول وتردد الخطوة.

all_formulas.name: Body Condition Score (BCS) — Equine
all_formulas.formula: Henneke scale: 1 (poor) to 9 (extremely fat); target 4–6 for performance; 5–7 for breeding mares
all_formulas.variables:
Assess at 6 sites: neck, withers, shoulder, ribs, loin, tailhead
BCS at covering predicts conception rate (target ≥5)
Score < 3 = welfare concern
all_formulas.purpose: Visual and palpation assessment of fat cover at standardized body sites.
all_formulas.example: Performance horse: maintain BCS 4–5; broodmare: BCS 5–6 at breeding.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقييم حالة الجسم للخيول على مقياس 1-9.

all_formulas.name: Red Edge Position (REP)
all_formulas.variables:
R700, R740 = reflectance at 700nm and 740nm
REP shifts 700→720nm as N status declines
Correlates strongly with leaf chlorophyll and N content
all_formulas.purpose: Position of maximum slope in the red-edge region; most sensitive indicator of plant nitrogen status from remote sensing.
all_formulas.example: REP = 717 nm (adequate N); REP = 708 nm (N stress — consider top-dressing).
all_formulas.pitfall: Requires hyperspectral sensor with <5nm band width — not available from Sentinel-2.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب موضع الحافة الحمراء في الطيف ل تقييم صحة النبات.

all_formulas.name: Anthocyanin Reflectance Index (ARI)
all_formulas.variables:
R550, R700 = reflectance at 550nm and 700nm
Higher ARI = more anthocyanin (stress, senescence, or variety trait)
Useful for detecting cold stress, P deficiency, and variety identification
all_formulas.purpose: Estimates leaf anthocyanin content; indicator of plant stress responses.
all_formulas.example: ARI > 0.2 on non-red-leaf varieties → investigate P deficiency or cold stress.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: قياس محتوى الأنثوسيانين في النباتات.

all_formulas.name: Carotenoid:Chlorophyll Index (CCI)
all_formulas.variables:
Rising CCI indicates senescence or stress (carotenoids persist as chlorophyll degrades)
Useful for harvest timing and canopy senescence mapping
all_formulas.purpose: Ratio indicating dominance of carotenoids over chlorophyll; rises during senescence.
all_formulas.example: Green crop: CCI ≈ 1.2; senescing crop: CCI ≈ 2.5+.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: نسبة الكاروتينويد إلى الكلوروفيل في النبات.

all_formulas.name: Cost of Production per Hectare (COP/ha)
all_formulas.formula: COP/ha = (Fixed costs + Variable costs) / Hectares farmed
all_formulas.variables: Fixed: depreciation, land rent, labour overhead
all_formulas.purpose: Foundation metric of farm enterprise economics; identifies break-even yield.
all_formulas.example: Fixed $400/ha + Variable $650/ha → COP = $1,050/ha. At $200/t price, break-even = 5.25 t/ha.
all_formulas.pitfall: Allocate shared costs (machinery, management) consistently across enterprises.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب إجمالي تكلفة الإنتاج لكل هكتار.

all_formulas.name: Input Use Efficiency Score (IUES)
all_formulas.formula: IUES = Yield achieved / Yield expected given inputs applied
all_formulas.variables:
Compares actual yield to model-predicted yield for the inputs used
IUES < 0.8 = inefficient input use — investigate agronomic losses
Built into some FMS platforms as "performance index"
all_formulas.purpose: Reveals whether inputs are converting efficiently into yield.
all_formulas.example: Expected yield 7 t/ha given inputs; achieved 5.5 t/ha → IUES = 0.79 (investigate).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: قياس كفاءة تحويل المدخلات إلى إنتاج.

all_formulas.name: Return on Data Investment (RODI)
all_formulas.formula: RODI = Value of decisions improved by data / Cost of data collection system
all_formulas.variables:
Quantify: input savings, yield improvement, reduced waste, insurance savings
Typical precision ag ROI: $25–75/ha/year above system cost
Most value from VRA fertilizer and targeted scouting
all_formulas.purpose: Economic justification for digital tools and precision agriculture investment.
all_formulas.example: Precision N saves $80/ha, system costs $30/ha → RODI = 2.67 ($2.67 return per $1 invested).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب العائد المالي من استثمار أنظمة جمع البيانات.

all_formulas.name: Traceability Completeness Index (TCI)
all_formulas.variables:
Required attributes: origin, inputs, handling, testing, certification
TCI = 100% = fully traceable batch
Minimum for major retailers: >85%
all_formulas.purpose: Measures what proportion of required traceability data is actually recorded for a batch.
all_formulas.example: 14 of 16 required attributes recorded for a mango shipment → TCI = 87.5%.
all_formulas.pitfall: Identify highest-value missing attributes — origin and chemical residues typically most critical.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: نسبة السمات المتتبعة إلى السمات المطلوبة.

all_formulas.name: Time-to-Trace (TTT)
all_formulas.formula: TTT = Time from recall trigger to complete batch identification  [hours]
all_formulas.variables:
Industry target: <2 hours for fresh produce
FDA FSMA: < 24 hours for full trace-back
Blockchain systems achieve TTT < 2 seconds vs paper-based 6–7 days
all_formulas.purpose: Speed of tracing a contaminated batch through the supply chain; key food safety metric.
all_formulas.example: Walmart leafy greens blockchain: TTT reduced from 7 days to 2.2 seconds.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: الوقت اللازم لتتبع دفعة كاملة من المنتج.

all_formulas.name: Consumer Trust Premium (CTP)
all_formulas.formula: CTP = Price premium from certified traceable product / Certification cost
all_formulas.variables:
Organic: 20–100% premium; Rainforest Alliance: 5–15%; Fair Trade: 10–30%
Blockchain-verified: emerging premiums of 5–20%
Premiums highest in export and specialty markets
all_formulas.purpose: Economic return on traceability investment from market price premiums.
all_formulas.example: Cacao: $200/t premium for certification, $30/t certification cost → CTP = 6.7.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب العلاوة السعرية للمنتجات القابلة للتتبع.

all_formulas.name: Field Efficiency Index (FEI)
all_formulas.formula: FEI (%) = Effective field capacity / Theoretical field capacity × 100
all_formulas.variables:
Theoretical = speed × working width × 10⁻¹
Effective = actual ha/hr after turns, overlaps, downtime
Target: >75% for autonomous; conventional: 65–80%
all_formulas.purpose: Actual productivity relative to theoretical maximum; measures operational losses.
all_formulas.example: Autonomous tractor: theoretical 8 ha/hr, actual 6.4 ha/hr → FEI = 80%.
all_formulas.pitfall: Autonomous systems can improve FEI by reducing operator fatigue-related downtime.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: نسبة السعة الفعلية إلى السعة النظرية للمعدات.

all_formulas.name: Robotic Harvest Miss Rate & Damage Rate
all_formulas.formula:
Miss rate (%) = Unharvested fruit / Total fruit × 100
Damage rate (%) = Damaged fruit / Total harvested × 100
all_formulas.variables:
Commercial viability: miss rate <5%, damage rate <2%
Current sweet pepper robots: miss rate 10–25%, damage 3–8%
Technology rapidly improving — benchmark annually
all_formulas.purpose: Key quality and efficiency metrics for selective harvesting robots.
all_formulas.example: Apple robot: 50 fruit/tree, 3 missed, 2 damaged → miss=6%, damage=4% (near commercial).
all_formulas.name_ar: معدل الفشل والضرر في الحصاد الآلي
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب نسبة الفواكه غير المحصودة والمتضررة.

all_formulas.name: Automation ROI
all_formulas.formula: ROI (%) = (Labour savings + Yield improvement − System cost) / System cost × 100
all_formulas.variables:
Include: purchase, maintenance, training, connectivity costs
Typical autonomous tractor ROI: 15–35% over 5 years
Harvesting robots: ROI depends heavily on labour cost and availability
all_formulas.purpose: Financial return on automation investment; compares to alternative use of capital.
all_formulas.example: System cost $120k, annual labour saving $35k, 5-yr total saving $175k → ROI = 46%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب العائد المالي من استثمارات الأتمتة الزراعية.

all_formulas.name: Carbon Footprint (CF) — Farm Gate
all_formulas.formula: CF (kg CO₂-eq/kg product) = Σ(Activity × Emission factor) / Functional unit
all_formulas.variables:
Include: N₂O from fertilizer, CH₄ from livestock, CO₂ from energy, land use change
Functional unit: 1 kg milk, 1 kg grain, 1 kg live weight
Global warming potential (GWP100): N₂O=298, CH₄=25 (AR4)
all_formulas.purpose: Total greenhouse gas burden per unit of agricultural product; primary sustainability KPI.
all_formulas.example: Dairy: enteric CH₄ + manure N₂O + feed production CO₂ → typical 1.0–2.5 kg CO₂-eq/kg FPCM.
all_formulas.pitfall: Scope: include purchased feed and energy (Scope 3) for full picture.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب إجمالي انبعاثات الكربون لكل وحدة منتج.

all_formulas.name: Water Footprint (WF)
all_formulas.formula: WF = Blue WF + Green WF + Grey WF  [m³/tonne]
all_formulas.variables:
Blue = surface + groundwater consumed
Green = rainwater consumed (evapotranspiration)
Grey = water to dilute pollutant load to safe level
Beef: WF ≈ 15,400 m³/t; wheat: ≈ 1,830 m³/t
all_formulas.purpose: Total freshwater consumption and pollution footprint per unit of product.
all_formulas.example: Irrigated cotton: Blue WF=7,000m³/t, Green=5,000m³/t, Grey=200m³/t → WF=12,200m³/t.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب إجمالي استهلاك المياه لكل وحدة منتج.

all_formulas.name: Land Use Efficiency (LUE — LCA Context)
all_formulas.formula: LUE = 1 / (Land occupied m² × days / kg product)
all_formulas.variables:
Compares land productivity across systems and locations
Allows comparison of different production systems on a common basis
all_formulas.purpose: Land occupation efficiency; allows comparison of intensive vs extensive systems on product basis.
all_formulas.example: Tomato greenhouse: 0.5 m²·days/kg; field tomato: 2.3 m²·days/kg → 4.6× land efficiency.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: كفاءة استخدام الأراضي لإنتاج وحدة من المنتج.

all_formulas.name: Partial Budget Analysis (PBA)
all_formulas.formula: Net change = (Added returns + Reduced costs) − (Added costs + Reduced returns)
all_formulas.variables:
Used to evaluate a single management change without full farm budget
Positive net change = beneficial change; negative = avoid
Only account for items that change — ignore fixed costs
all_formulas.purpose: Rapid economic screening for single technology or practice changes.
all_formulas.example: New variety: +$200 yield revenue, −$30 seed cost, −$20 extra labour → Net change = +$150/ha.
all_formulas.pitfall: Most powerful when combined with yield data from local on-farm trials.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب التغير الصافي في العائد والتكاليف من تغيير معين.

all_formulas.name: Return to Family Labour (RFL)
all_formulas.formula: RFL ($/day) = Net farm income / Family labour days
all_formulas.variables:
Compare to local casual labour wage
RFL < wage rate = farm labour not competitive — investigate
Include all unpaid household labour (commonly undervalued by 40–60%)
all_formulas.purpose: Value of family labour contribution; critical where cash income and food production overlap.
all_formulas.example: Net income $1,200, 120 family labour days → RFL = $10/day (compare to $8/day local wage = viable).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب صافي دخل المزرعة لكل يوم عمل عائلي.

all_formulas.name: Break-even Yield (BEY)
all_formulas.formula: BEY = Total variable costs / Crop price  [t/ha or units/ha]
all_formulas.variables:
Compare BEY to expected yield and historical yields
If expected yield < BEY → do not invest in that input package
Risk buffer: add 20% to BEY for risk management
all_formulas.purpose: Minimum yield required to cover variable costs; critical input decision threshold for smallholders.
all_formulas.example: Variable costs $400/ha, price $160/t → BEY = 2.5 t/ha. Expected yield 3.5 t/ha → profitable.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب الحد الأدنى للإنتاج لتغطية التكاليف المتغيرة.

all_formulas.name: Subsistence Value of Home Consumption
all_formulas.formula: Subsistence value = Quantity consumed × Local market retail price
all_formulas.variables:
Often 30–70% of smallholder farm output
Must include in total farm revenue calculations
Critical for food security and welfare analysis
all_formulas.purpose: Monetary value of food produced and consumed at home; frequently excluded from farm income calculations.
all_formulas.example: Family consumes 500 kg grain at $0.35/kg market price → Subsistence value = $175/yr.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب قيمة المنتجات المستهلكة محلياً.

all_formulas.name: Land Rent Capitalization Rate
all_formulas.formula: Land value = Annual net rent / Capitalization rate
all_formulas.variables:
Capitalization rate = risk-free rate + land risk premium (typically 3–6%)
Net rent = gross rent − property taxes, maintenance
Annual rent = Land value × Cap rate
all_formulas.purpose: Links annual land rental value to capital value; used for land purchase decisions.
all_formulas.example: Annual net rent $400/ha, cap rate 4% → Land value = $10,000/ha.
all_formulas.pitfall: Cap rates vary by region, crop potential, and irrigation access — use local comparables.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب قيمة الأرض من الإيجار السنوي ومعدل الرسملة.

all_formulas.name: Sharecropping Efficiency Index (SEI)
all_formulas.formula: SEI = (Actual output under share tenancy / Potential output under owner-operation)
all_formulas.variables:
SEI < 1 due to Marshallian disincentive effect (tenant gets only share of marginal gain)
Theory predicts SEI = share ratio (e.g., 0.5 for 50:50 crop sharing)
Monitoring SEI guides contract restructuring
all_formulas.purpose: Efficiency loss attributable to sharecropping tenure relative to owner-operated baseline.
all_formulas.example: Owner-operated plots yield 5 t/ha; tenant-operated (50% share) yield 4.1 t/ha → SEI = 0.82.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مقارنة الإنتاج الفعلي بالمحتمل تحت نظام المشاركة.

all_formulas.name: Leasehold vs Ownership NPV Comparison
all_formulas.formula:
NPV_lease = Σ[Farm profit − Rent] / (1+r)^t
NPV_own = Σ[Farm profit] / (1+r)^t − Land price
all_formulas.variables:
Compare NPVs over 10–20 year horizon
If NPV_own > NPV_lease → buying is preferable (at that land price)
Sensitivity to land price appreciation significantly affects result
all_formulas.purpose: Guides the buy-vs-lease decision for land expansion using discounted cash flow analysis.
all_formulas.example: At 4% discount rate and 2% land appreciation: ownership becomes superior beyond ~15 years.
all_formulas.name_ar: مقارنة القيمة الحالية الصافية: الإيجار مقابل الملكية
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مقارنة القيمة الحالية الصافية للإيجار والملكية.

all_formulas.name: Nutrient Recycling Efficiency (NRE)
all_formulas.formula: NRE (%) = Nutrients returned to soil / Nutrients harvested in products × 100
all_formulas.variables:
Include manure, crop residues, compost, recycled irrigation water
NRE = 100% = all harvested nutrients returned (closed loop)
Typical conventional farms: NRE 20–40%; integrated crop-livestock: 50–80%
all_formulas.purpose: Proportion of extracted nutrients that are recycled within the farm system.
all_formulas.example: Harvested N: 150 kg/ha; returned via manure and residues: 90 kg/ha → NRE = 60%.
all_formulas.pitfall: High NRE reduces fertilizer purchase and environmental nutrient losses simultaneously.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: نسبة العناصر الغذائية المعادة إلى التربة إلى المحصودة.

all_formulas.name: Manure Nitrogen Recovery (MNR)
all_formulas.formula: MNR (%) = Crop N uptake from manure / Total N in manure applied × 100
all_formulas.variables:
First year recovery: 30–60% for solid manure; 60–80% for slurry
Remaining N mineralizes in subsequent years
Injection > surface application for ammonia conservation
all_formulas.purpose: Efficiency of converting manure N into crop N uptake; guides manure management.
all_formulas.example: 15 t/ha cattle slurry at 2.5% N = 375 kg N; crop takes up 195 kg N → MNR = 52%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: نسبة النيتروجين الممتص من السماد العضوي.

all_formulas.name: Energy Self-Sufficiency Ratio (ESR)
all_formulas.formula: ESR = On-farm energy production / Total farm energy consumption
all_formulas.variables:
ESR > 1 = net energy exporter
Biogas, solar PV, biomass boilers contribute to ESR
Typical integrated biogas farm: ESR 0.6–1.2
all_formulas.purpose: Proportion of energy needs met by on-farm renewable production.
all_formulas.example: Farm uses 150 MWh/yr, biogas system produces 110 MWh → ESR = 0.73 (73% energy self-sufficient).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: نسبة إنتاج الطاقة في المزرعة إلى استهلاكها.

all_formulas.name: Crop Residue Utilization Rate (CRUR)
all_formulas.formula: CRUR (%) = Residue used productively / Total residue produced × 100
all_formulas.variables:
Productive uses: livestock feed, biogas, compost, mulch, bioenergy
Burning = 0% CRUR (waste + pollution)
Target: CRUR > 70% in integrated systems
all_formulas.purpose: Proportion of crop residues converted to productive uses rather than burned or wasted.
all_formulas.example: 8 t/ha maize stover: 5 t fed to cattle, 2 t composted, 1 t left on field → CRUR = 87.5%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: نسبة بقايا المحاصيل المستخدمة بشكل منتج.

all_formulas.name: Cassava Harvest Index & Starch Index
all_formulas.formula:
HI = Fresh root weight / Total fresh plant weight × 100
Starch index (SI) = Root dry matter% × HI / 100
all_formulas.variables:
Cassava HI target: 55–70% fresh weight basis
Root DM% of 30–40% indicates high starch
SI > 20 = high-value processing cassava
all_formulas.purpose: Cassava-specific adaptation of harvest index and starch quality metric for industrial processors.
all_formulas.example: Fresh roots 15 kg, total plant 22 kg → HI = 68%. Root DM 35% → SI = 0.35×68 = 23.8.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب مؤشر الحصاد ومؤشر النشا لجذور الكسافا.
all_formulas.part: Visual Guides, Decision Tools & Global Content

all_formulas.name: Cacao Pod Value Index (PVI)
all_formulas.formula: PVI = Bean weight per pod / Pod fresh weight × 100  (target: >10%)
all_formulas.variables:
Pod index = number of pods to produce 1 kg dry beans (target: <18)
Fermentation quality: 3–7 days determines final cup quality
Dry bean recovery: fresh fermented beans / dry beans ≈ 2.2:1
all_formulas.purpose: Productivity and quality metrics for cacao — the difference between fine and bulk chocolate.
all_formulas.example: 18 pods, each 350g, each 40g dry beans → Pod index = 18 pods/0.72kg = 25 (poor — investigate variety).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب نسبة وزن البذور إلى وزن القرن للكاكاو.
all_formulas.part: Visual Guides, Decision Tools & Global Content

all_formulas.name: Banana Bunch Weight Index (BWI)
all_formulas.formula: BWI = Bunch weight (kg) / Number of hands × Number of fingers
all_formulas.variables:
Target: finger weight >200g for export grade (Cavendish)
Bunch weight 25–45 kg is commercial target
Days from flowering to harvest: 90–120 days depending on altitude
all_formulas.purpose: Measures bunch filling efficiency; guides fertilization and crop load management.
all_formulas.example: 30 kg bunch, 9 hands, 18 fingers per hand → BWI = 30/(9×18) = 185g/finger (borderline export).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب متوسط وزن الإصبع من وزن الخردلة.
all_formulas.part: Visual Guides, Decision Tools & Global Content

all_formulas.name: Coffee Cup Score & Screen Size
all_formulas.formula:
SCA cup score: 80–100 (specialty); <80 (commercial)
Screen size: % retained on designated screen (e.g., Screen 18 = 7.14mm)
all_formulas.variables:
Screen 18+ = premium grade; Screen 15 = commercial grade
Q Grader certified cupping uses SCA 100-point protocol
Cup score: aroma, flavor, aftertaste, acidity, body, uniformity, balance, sweetness
all_formulas.purpose: International quality grading system for green coffee; determines market price category.
all_formulas.example: Screen 18: 85%, Screen 17: 10%, below: 5% → Premium grade (>80% screen 18 required for specialty).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقييم جودة القهوة بناءً على درجة التذوق وحجم الحبوب.
all_formulas.part: Visual Guides, Decision Tools & Global Content

all_formulas.name: Rainfall Use Efficiency (RUE)
all_formulas.purpose: Primary productivity metric for rainfed systems; tracks efficiency of converting rain to yield.
all_formulas.example: Sorghum: 2,800 kg/ha with 380 mm rain → RUE = 7.4 kg/ha/mm.
all_formulas.pitfall: RUE is sensitive to distribution, not just total rainfall — a drought at flowering depresses RUE severely.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب الإنتاج لكل ملليمتر من أمطار موسم النمو.
all_formulas.part: Visual Guides, Decision Tools & Global Content

all_formulas.name: Water Harvest Index (WHI)
all_formulas.formula: WHI = Grain yield (kg/ha) / Total water use (rainfall + stored soil water, mm)
all_formulas.variables: More comprehensive than RUE — includes stored water drawdown
all_formulas.purpose: Efficiency of converting all available water (rain + soil store) into grain.
all_formulas.example: Wheat: 2,400 kg/ha, 280 mm rain + 60 mm soil water used → WHI = 2400/340 = 7.1 kg/ha/mm.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: كفاءة تحويل إجمالي المياه المتاحة إلى إنتاج حبي.
all_formulas.part: Visual Guides, Decision Tools & Global Content

all_formulas.name: Drought Tolerance Index (DTI)
all_formulas.formula: DTI = (Ys × Yd) / (Yp)²  where Ys = stressed yield, Yd = drought yield, Yp = potential yield
all_formulas.variables:
Fischer-Maurer index: higher DTI = better drought tolerance without yield penalty under good conditions
Used in variety selection and breeding program screening
all_formulas.purpose: Combines yield stability under drought with absolute productivity; identifies varieties good in both environments.
all_formulas.example: Variety A: Ys=3.5, Yd=2.1, Yp=4.0 → DTI = (3.5×2.1)/16 = 0.46. Variety B DTI=0.38 → choose A.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقييم قدرة الأصناف على تحمل الجفاف مع الحفاظ على الإنتاج.
all_formulas.part: Visual Guides, Decision Tools & Global Content

all_formulas.name: Runoff Coefficient (RC)
all_formulas.variables:
Bare soil, slope >5%: RC = 0.4–0.7
Good ground cover, flat: RC = 0.1–0.2
Reduce RC to increase infiltration and stored soil water
all_formulas.purpose: Proportion of rainfall that runs off rather than infiltrating; key for water conservation planning.
all_formulas.example: 50 mm rain, 18 mm measured runoff → RC = 0.36. Conservation target: RC < 0.15 with good cover.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: نسبة مياه الجريان السطحي إلى إجمالي هطول الأمطار.
all_formulas.part: Visual Guides, Decision Tools & Global Content

all_formulas.name: Nutrient Density per Hectare (NutriDens)
all_formulas.formula: NutriDens_nutrient = Yield (kg/ha) × Nutrient content (per kg) / Daily requirement
all_formulas.variables:
Calculate separately for protein, energy, vitamin A, iron, zinc
Compare across crops to identify nutritionally efficient land uses
Legumes dominate on protein density; orange-fleshed crops on vitamin A
all_formulas.purpose: Quantifies how much of a daily nutritional requirement one hectare can supply; guides crop mix for nutrition security.
all_formulas.example: Cowpea: 1.2 t/ha × 215g protein/kg / 50g daily requirement = 5,160 person-days protein/ha.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب عدد أيام الشخص التي يمكن أن يوفرها الهكتار.
all_formulas.part: Visual Guides, Decision Tools & Global Content

all_formulas.name: Diet Quality Score from Farm Production
all_formulas.formula: DQS = Σ(food groups produced on farm or purchased / Required food groups) × 100
all_formulas.variables:
Based on FAO/WHO recommended 10 food groups
DQS = 100% = all food groups supplied from farm + income
Track monthly — seasonal gaps are common stress points
all_formulas.purpose: Tracks dietary diversity achievable from the farm system and income it generates.
all_formulas.example: Farm produces 6 of 10 food groups adequately → DQS = 60% (needs supplementation of dairy/animal foods).
all_formulas.name_ar: درجة جودة النظام الغذائي من إنتاج المزرعة
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقييم تنوع وتغطية المجموعات الغذائية من المزرعة.
all_formulas.part: Visual Guides, Decision Tools & Global Content

all_formulas.name: Cost of Nutritious Diet (CoND)
all_formulas.formula: CoND ($/person/day) = Minimum cost of a diet meeting all nutrient requirements from local foods
all_formulas.variables:
Compare to household income per person per day
CoND > 30% of income = diet affordability problem
Used to set wage floors and food price policy targets
all_formulas.purpose: Minimum daily expenditure for a nutritionally adequate diet using locally available foods.
all_formulas.example: CoND in Sub-Saharan Africa: $1.50–3.50/person/day vs World Bank extreme poverty line $2.15.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: الحد الأدنى لتكلفة نظام غذائي يلبي جميع الاحتياجات الغذائية.
all_formulas.part: Visual Guides, Decision Tools & Global Content

all_formulas.name: Continuity Equation
all_formulas.variables:
Q = Flow Rate (m³/s)
A = Area (m²)
v = Velocity (m/s)
all_formulas.purpose: Calculates flow rate based on area and velocity.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب معدل التصرف المائي بناءً على مساحة المقطع والسرعة.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Q = التصرف (م³/ثانية)
A = المساحة (م²)
v = السرعة (م/ث)

all_formulas.name: Bernoulli Equation
all_formulas.variables:
p = Pressure (Pa)
gamma = Spec. Weight (9810 N/m³)
v = Velocity (m/s)
g = Gravity (9.81 m/s²)
z = Elevation (m)
all_formulas.purpose: Energy conservation for fluids; relates pressure, velocity, elevation.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: قانون حفظ الطاقة للسوائل؛ يربط الضغط والسرعة والارتفاع.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
p = الضغط (با)
gamma = الوزن النوعي (9810 نيوتن/م³)
v = السرعة (م/ث)
g = الجاذبية (9.81 م/ث²)
z = المنسوب (م)

all_formulas.name: Reynolds Number
all_formulas.variables:
Re = Reynolds Number (-)
rho = Density (1000 kg/m³)
v = Velocity (m/s)
D = Diameter (m)
all_formulas.purpose: Determines flow regime (Laminar or Turbulent).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يستخدم لتحديد حالة الجريان (صفائحي أو مضطرب).
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Re = رقم رينولدز (بدون وحدة)
rho = كثافة الماء (1000 كجم/م³)
v = السرعة (م/ث)
D = القطر (م)

all_formulas.name: Froude Number
all_formulas.variables:
Fr = Froude Number
v = Velocity (m/s)
g = Gravity (9.81)
y = Depth (m)
all_formulas.purpose: Characterizes open channel flow (Subcritical/Supercritical).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يحدد حالة الجريان في القنوات المفتوحة (هادئ أو حرج).
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Fr = رقم فرود (-)
v = السرعة (م/ث)
g = الجاذبية (9.81)
y = العمق (م)

all_formulas.name: Euler Hydrostatic Eq.
all_formulas.formula: Δ p = rho g Δ h
all_formulas.variables:
Dp = Delta P (Pa)
rho = Density
g = Gravity
Dh = Delta h (m)
all_formulas.purpose: Pressure change with depth in static fluid.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب فرق الضغط الناتج عن تغير الارتفاع في سائل ساكن.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Dp = فرق الضغط (با)
rho = كثافة السائل (كجم/م³)
g = الجاذبية (9.81)
Dh = فرق الارتفاع (م)

all_formulas.name: Darcy-Weisbach Equation
all_formulas.variables:
hf = Head Loss (m)
f = Friction Factor
L = Length (m)
D = Diameter (m)
all_formulas.purpose: Most accurate equation for pipe friction losses.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: أدق معادلة لحساب فواقد الاحتكاك في الأنابيب.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
hf = فقد الضاغط (م)
f = معامل الاحتكاك
L = الطول (م)
D = القطر (م)

all_formulas.name: Hazen-Williams Equation
all_formulas.variables:
hf = Head Loss (m)
Q = Flow Rate (m³/s)
C = Roughness (PVC=150)
all_formulas.purpose: Widely used for friction loss in irrigation pipes.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تستخدم في تصميم شبكات الري بالأنابيب البلاستيكية والمعدنية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
hf = فقد الضاغط (م)
Q = التصرف (م³/ث)
C = معامل الخشونة (PVC=150)

all_formulas.name: Pipe Velocity
all_formulas.variables:
v = Velocity (m/s)
Q = Flow (m³/s)
D = Diameter (m)
pi = Pi constant
all_formulas.purpose: Calculating velocity from flow and diameter.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب سرعة المياه بمعلومية التصرف والقطر.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
v = السرعة (م/ث)
Q = التصرف (م³/ث)
D = القطر (م)
pi = 3.14

all_formulas.name: Pipe Discharge
all_formulas.variables:
Q = Flow (m³/s)
D = Diameter (m)
v = Velocity (m/s)
all_formulas.purpose: Calculating discharge from diameter and velocity.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب كمية المياه المارة في أنبوب معلوم القطر والسرعة.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Q = التصرف (م³/ث)
D = القطر (م)
v = السرعة (م/ث)

all_formulas.name: Colebrook-White Eq.
all_formulas.variables:
f = Friction f
e = Roughness (m)
D = Diameter
Re = Reynolds No.
all_formulas.purpose: Determines friction factor f experimentally.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تستخدم لحساب معامل الاحتكاك f تجريبياً.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
f = معامل الاحتكاك
e = الخشونة المطلقة (م)
D = القطر (م)
Re = رقم رينولدز

all_formulas.name: Operating Pressure (Pa)
all_formulas.variables:
p = Pressure
h = Head
all_formulas.purpose: Converting head (m) to pressure.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تحويل الضاغط بالمتر لضغط تشغيل.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
p = الضغط (با)
h = الضاغط (م)

all_formulas.name: Major Head Losses
all_formulas.variables:
hf = Head Loss (m)
L = Length
v = Velocity
all_formulas.purpose: Head loss due to pipe wall friction.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: الفقد في الضغط الناتج عن احتكاك السائل بجدار الأنبوب.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
hf = الفقد بالمتر
L = طول الأنبوب
v = السرعة

all_formulas.name: Minor Head Losses
all_formulas.variables:
hm = Minor Loss (m)
K = K factor
v = Velocity
all_formulas.purpose: Losses from valves, elbows, and fittings.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: الفواقد الناتجة عن الوصلات والمحابس والأكواع.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
hm = الفقد (م)
K = معامل الفقد للقطعة
v = السرعة

all_formulas.name: Total Dynamic Head
all_formulas.variables:
TDH = Total Head (m)
Hs = Suction Head
Hd = Discharge Head
all_formulas.purpose: Total energy required by the pump.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: إجمالي الطاقة المطلوبة من المضخة للتغلب على الارتفاع والاحتكاك.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
TDH = الضاغط الكلي (م)
Hs = رفع السحب (م)
Hd = رفع الطرد (م)

all_formulas.name: Equivalent Length
all_formulas.variables:
Le = Eq. Length (m)
K = K factor
D = Diameter
f = f factor
all_formulas.purpose: Converting fittings to equivalent pipe length.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تحويل فواقد الوصلات إلى طول أنبوب افتراضي.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Le = الطول المكافئ (م)
K = معامل الفقد
D = القطر
f = معامل الاحتكاك

all_formulas.name: Pressure Drop Conv.
all_formulas.variables:
Dp = Delta P
hf = Head Loss
all_formulas.purpose: Converting head loss (m) to pressure (Pa/Bar).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تحويل الفقد بالمتر إلى وحدات الضغط (بار أو باسكال).
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Dp = فرق الضغط (با)
hf = الفقد (م)

all_formulas.name: Head Loss Example
all_formulas.variables: hf = Head Loss
all_formulas.purpose: Loss in 1km main line example.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب الفقد في خط رئيسي بطول 1كم.
all_formulas.variables_ar: hf = الفقد (م)

all_formulas.name: Manning Equation
all_formulas.variables:
Q = Flow Rate
n = Manning n
A = Area
R = Hydraulic Radius
S = Slope
all_formulas.purpose: Discharge calculation for open channels/canals.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب التصرف في القنوات المفتوحة والترع والمصارف.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Q = التصرف (م³/ث)
n = معامل الخشونة
A = مساحة المقطع
R = نصف قطر هيدروليكي
S = ميل القاع

all_formulas.name: Chezy Equation
all_formulas.variables:
v = Velocity
C = Chezy C
R = Hyd. Radius
all_formulas.purpose: Mean velocity in open channel flow.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب السرعة المتوسطة في القنوات المفتوحة.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
v = السرعة (م/ث)
C = معامل شيزي
R = نصف القطر الهيدروليكي

all_formulas.name: Critical Flow Condition
all_formulas.variables: Fr = Froude Number (=1)
all_formulas.purpose: Minimum specific energy condition.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تحدث عندما تكون الطاقة النوعية في حدها الأدنى.
all_formulas.variables_ar: Fr = رقم فرود (يساوي 1)

all_formulas.name: Specific Energy
all_formulas.variables:
E = Energy (m)
y = Depth
v = Velocity
all_formulas.purpose: Total energy relative to channel bottom.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: الطاقة الكلية لكل وحدة وزن من السائل منسوبة للقاع.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
E = الطاقة (م)
y = عمق الماء (م)
v = السرعة

all_formulas.name: Uniform Flow Condition
all_formulas.variables:
Sf = Energy slope
S0 = Bed slope
all_formulas.purpose: Energy slope equals bed slope.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يحدث عندما يتساوى ميل خط الطاقة مع ميل القاع.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Sf = ميل خط الطاقة
S0 = ميل القاع

all_formulas.name: Hydraulic Power
all_formulas.variables:
