all_formulas.variables:
V = Volume
r = Radius
h = Height
pi = Pi constant
all_formulas.purpose: Capacity of circular tanks.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب سعة الخزانات الدائرية.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
V = الحجم (م³)
r = نصف القطر
h = الارتفاع
pi = 3.14159

all_formulas.name: Detention Time
all_formulas.variables:
td = Time
V = Volume
Q = Flow
all_formulas.purpose: Time to replace total volume.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: الزمن اللازم لتغيير كامل ماء الخزان.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
td = الزمن (ساعة)
V = حجم الخزان
Q = التصرف

all_formulas.name: Inflow-Outflow Balance
all_formulas.formula: Δ S = Σ Q_in - Σ Q_out
all_formulas.variables:
DS = Delta Storage
Qin = Inflow
Qout = Outflow
all_formulas.purpose: Conservation of mass in tanks.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مبدأ حفظ الكتلة في الخزانات.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
DS = تغير التخزين
Qin = التدفق الداخل
Qout = التدفق الخارج

all_formulas.name: Seepage Loss
all_formulas.variables:
S = Seepage
k = Conductivity
i = Gradient
A = Area
all_formulas.purpose: Losses from unlined reservoirs.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب الفواقد من الخزانات غير المبطنة.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
S = التسرب (م³/ث)
k = الموصلية
i = الميل الهيدروليكي
A = مساحة السطح

all_formulas.name: Flow Rate Conv.
all_formulas.variables:
Qm3/h = m3/h
Qm3/s = m3/s
all_formulas.purpose: Conversion between m3/s and m3/h.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: التحويل بين المتر المكعب في الثانية والساعة.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
Qm3/h = متر مكعب/ساعة
Qm3/s = متر مكعب/ثانية

all_formulas.name: Bar to Pascal Conv.
all_formulas.variables:
bar = Bar
Pa = Pascal
all_formulas.purpose: Relation between Bar and Pascal.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: العلاقة بين وحدة البار والباسكال.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
bar = وحدة البار
Pa = باسكال

all_formulas.name: Pressure to Head Conv.
all_formulas.variables:
h = Head (m)
p = Pressure
rho = Density
g = Gravity
all_formulas.purpose: Converting pressure to head (m).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تحويل الضغط المسجل لارتفاع مائي بالمتر.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
h = الضاغط (م)
p = الضغط (با)
rho = 1000
g = 9.81

all_formulas.name: Hectare to m2 Conv.
all_formulas.variables:
ha = Hectare
m2 = m2
all_formulas.purpose: Hectare is 10,000 sq. meters.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: الهكتار يساوي 10 آلاف متر مربع.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
ha = هكتار
m2 = متر مربع

all_formulas.name: m3 to Liters Conv.
all_formulas.variables:
m3 = m3
L = Liters
all_formulas.purpose: m3 equals 1000 liters.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: المتر المكعب يساوي ألف لتر.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
m3 = متر مكعب
L = لتر

all_formulas.name: Gravity Constant
all_formulas.variables: g = Gravity
all_formulas.purpose: Earth's gravitational acceleration.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: قيمة تسارع الجاذبية الأرضية الثابتة.
all_formulas.variables_ar: g = عجلة الجاذبية

all_formulas.name: Water Density
all_formulas.variables: rho w = Water Density
all_formulas.purpose: Standard water density.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: كثافة الماء القياسية عند حرارة الغرفة.
all_formulas.variables_ar: rho w = كثافة الماء

all_formulas.name: Specific Weight of Water
all_formulas.variables: gamma w = Spec. Weight
all_formulas.purpose: Density times gravity.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حاصل ضرب كثافة الماء في الجاذبية.
all_formulas.variables_ar: gamma w = الوزن النوعي

all_formulas.name: Kinematic Viscosity
all_formulas.variables: nu = Viscosity
all_formulas.purpose: Water viscosity at 20C.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: لزوجة الماء عند 20 درجة مئوية.
all_formulas.variables_ar: nu = اللزوجة الحركية

all_formulas.name: Atmospheric Pressure
all_formulas.variables: pa = Atm. Pressure
all_formulas.purpose: Standard pressure at sea level.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: قيمة الضغط الجوي عند سطح البحر.
all_formulas.variables_ar: pa = الضغط الجوي

all_formulas.name: Pipe Sizing Design
all_formulas.variables:
D = Diameter
Q = Flow
v = Velocity
all_formulas.purpose: Sizing pipe based on flow/velocity.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تحديد القطر بناءً على التصرف والسرعة.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
D = القطر المطلرب (م)
Q = التصرف (م³/ث)
v = السرعة المطلوبة

all_formulas.name: Power in HP
all_formulas.variables:
HP = HP
P(W) = Watts
all_formulas.purpose: Converting Watts to Horsepower.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: التحويل من وحدة الوات للحصان.
all_formulas.variables_ar:
HP = الحصان
P(W) = الوات

all_formulas.name: Penman-Monteith ETo (FAO-56)
all_formulas.variables:
Δ = slope of saturation vapor pressure curve (kPa/°C)
Rn = net radiation (MJ/m²/day)
G = soil heat flux (MJ/m²/day)
γ = psychrometric constant (kPa/°C)
T = mean air temp (°C)
u₂ = wind speed at 2m (m/s)
es = saturation VP (kPa)
ea = actual VP (kPa)
all_formulas.purpose: Reference evapotranspiration — the global standard for irrigation scheduling.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using wind speed at wrong height — must be 2m, or adjust with FAO-56 Eq. 47.
all_formulas.decision: Use this for all FAO-56 Kc × ETo irrigation calculations.
all_formulas.notes: Source: FAO Irrigation & Drainage Paper 56 (Allen et al., 1998), Eq. 6.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: التبخر-نتح المرجعي — المعيار العالمي لجدولة الري.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Dual Crop Coefficient (Kc = Kcb + Ke)
all_formulas.variables:
Kcb = basal crop coefficient
Ks = water stress coefficient (0-1)
Ke = soil evaporation coefficient
all_formulas.purpose: Separates plant transpiration from soil evaporation for precision irrigation.
all_formulas.pitfall: Forgetting Ks during deficit irrigation; over-estimating Ke after rain.
all_formulas.decision: Use dual Kc for daily irrigation scheduling; single Kc for weekly planning.
all_formulas.notes: Source: FAO-56 Chapter 7, Eq. 71. Ks = (TAW - Dr) / ((1-p) × TAW).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يفصل نتح النبات عن تبخر التربة للري الدقيق.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Water Stress Coefficient (Ks)
all_formulas.variables:
TAW = total available water (mm)
Dr = root zone depletion (mm)
p = depletion fraction (0.3-0.7)
all_formulas.purpose: Quantifies reduction in ET under water stress — enables deficit irrigation planning.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using p for one crop on another — p varies by crop and ETc rate.
all_formulas.decision: Trigger irrigation when Ks < 0.85 for most crops; <0.70 for stress-tolerant.
all_formulas.notes: Source: FAO-56 Eq. 84. Default p=0.5 for most crops; see Table 22.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يحدد انخفاض النتح تحت الإجهاد المائي لتمكين التخطيط للري الناقص.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Salinity-Adjusted ET (FAO-56)
all_formulas.variables:
ECe = electrical conductivity of saturation extract (dS/m)
b = crop-specific slope (% yield decrease per dS/m)
Kc = crop coefficient
ETo = reference ET
all_formulas.purpose: Reduces ET estimate when soil salinity limits water uptake.
all_formulas.example: Tomato (b=10%), ECe=4 dS/m, Kc=1.15, ETo=5 → ETc_adj = 1.15×5×(1-4×10/100) = 4.83 mm/day (vs 5.75 unstressed).
all_formulas.pitfall: Using threshold ECt instead of actual ECe; forgetting b varies by crop.
all_formulas.decision: If ETc_adj < 80% of ETc, leach salts before planting.
all_formulas.notes: Source: FAO-56 Chapter 8, Eq. 98. See Table 14 for crop-specific b values.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يخفض تقدير النتح عندما تحد الملوحة من امتصاص الماء.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Net Radiation (Rn) — FAO-56
all_formulas.variables:
Rns = net shortwave radiation (MJ/m²/day) = (1-α)×Rs
Rnl = net longwave radiation (MJ/m²/day)
α = albedo (0.23 for crops)
Rs = solar radiation
all_formulas.purpose: Required input for Penman-Monteith; converts raw solar radiation to net energy.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using α=0.05 (water) for crops; forgetting Rnl depends on cloud cover.
all_formulas.notes: Source: FAO-56 Eq. 38-40. Rnl depends on T, ea, Rs/Rso ratio.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مدخل مطلوب لمعادلة بينمان-مونتيث.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Psychrometric Constant (γ)
all_formulas.variables:
P = atmospheric pressure (kPa)
γ = psychrometric constant (kPa/°C)
all_formulas.purpose: Required for Penman-Monteith; varies with altitude.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using sea-level γ at high altitude — introduces 10-15% error in ETo.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مطلوب لمعادلة بينمان-مونتيث ويختلف مع الارتفاع.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Saturation Vapor Pressure (es) — FAO-56
all_formulas.variables:
T = air temperature (°C)
es = saturation vapor pressure (kPa)
all_formulas.purpose: Core thermodynamic function for all ET and VPD calculations.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using Tetens with Celsius vs Fahrenheit; mixing kPa and mb.
all_formulas.decision: Use this exact form for FAO-56; Murray (1967) is equivalent.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: الدالة الديناميكية الحرارية الأساسية لكل حسابات النتح.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Christiansen Uniformity Coefficient (CU)
all_formulas.variables:
xᵢ = individual catch value
x̄ = mean of all catches
n = number of catch cans
all_formulas.purpose: Measures sprinkler irrigation uniformity — target CU > 84% for most crops.
all_formulas.example: 16 catches averaging 10mm; sum of deviations = 12mm → CU = 100×(1-12/160) = 92.5%.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using only edge catches; ignoring wind drift.
all_formulas.decision: CU < 75%: redesign sprinkler spacing or pressure.
all_formulas.notes: Source: Christiansen (1942); USDA-NRCS NEH Part 652, Ch. 11.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يقيس تجانس الري بالرش.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Manning's Flow in Irrigation Channels
all_formulas.variables:
Q = flow rate (m³/s)
n = Manning's roughness (0.013 concrete, 0.025 earth)
A = cross-sectional area (m²)
R = hydraulic radius (m) = A/P
S = channel slope (m/m)
all_formulas.purpose: Design open-channel irrigation systems — furrows, canals, laterals.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using concrete n on vegetated channels (can underestimate by 3×).
all_formulas.decision: Keep velocity < 0.6 m/s in earth channels to prevent erosion.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تصميم قنوات الري المفتوحة.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Furrow Inflow Design (USDA-NRCS)
all_formulas.variables:
Q_in = furrow inflow (L/s)
L = furrow length (m)
q_req = required infiltration depth (mm)
F = furrow spacing (m)
T = application time (hours)
all_formulas.purpose: Size the inflow rate at the head of a furrow for uniform infiltration.
all_formulas.example: L=200m, q_req=50mm, F=1m, T=4h → Q_in = (200×50×1)/(3.6×4) = 694 L/s — too high, shorten furrow.
all_formulas.pitfall: Ignoring furrow advance time; underestimating T.
all_formulas.decision: If Q_in > 3 L/s, split furrow into sets.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تحديد معدل التدفق لكل أخدود للري المنتظم.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Available Water Capacity (AWC) by Texture
all_formulas.variables:
FC = field capacity (% by weight)
PWP = permanent wilting point (%)
D = root depth (cm)
AWC = available water (mm)
all_formulas.purpose: Estimate plant-available water for irrigation scheduling.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using % by weight without bulk density → off by 20-50%.
all_formulas.decision: Irrigate at 50% depletion (p=0.5) for most crops.
all_formulas.notes: Source: USDA Soil Survey Manual Handbook 18; NRCS Part 618.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقدير الماء المتاح للنبات لجدولة الري.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Horton Infiltration Model
all_formulas.variables:
f(t) = infiltration rate at time t (mm/h)
fc = final (asymptotic) infiltration rate
f₀ = initial infiltration rate
k = decay constant (1/h)
t = time since start (h)
all_formulas.purpose: Predict how fast water enters soil during irrigation or rainfall.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using lab f₀ on crusted field soil (real f₀ may be 50% lower).
all_formulas.decision: If f(t) < application rate, reduce flow or increase set time.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يتنبأ بسرعة دخول الماء للتربة أثناء الري.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Sprinkler Application Rate
all_formulas.variables:
I = application rate (mm/h)
Q = sprinkler discharge (L/min)
S₁ = spacing along lateral (m)
S₂ = spacing between laterals (m)
all_formulas.purpose: Match sprinkler rate to soil infiltration to prevent runoff.
all_formulas.pitfall: I > f(t) causes runoff; common with clay soils and impact sprinklers.
all_formulas.decision: If I > infiltration rate, use lower-flow nozzles or wider spacing.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مطابقة معدل الرش مع تسرب التربة لمنع الجريان.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Drip Emitter Flow Variation (qv)
all_formulas.variables:
qmax = maximum emitter flow
qmin = minimum emitter flow
qavg = average flow
qv = flow variation (%)
all_formulas.purpose: Evaluate uniformity of drip irrigation systems.
all_formulas.pitfall: Measuring only 2-3 emitters; need ≥ 18 for statistical validity.
all_formulas.decision: qv < 10% excellent; 10-20% acceptable; >20% redesign.
all_formulas.notes: Source: ASABE EP405.1; also see EU (emission uniformity).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقييم تجانس أنظمة الري بالتنقيط.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Emission Uniformity (EU) — ASABE
all_formulas.variables:
CV = coefficient of variation of emitters
qmin = minimum emitter flow (lowest 25%)
qavg = average flow
all_formulas.purpose: Comprehensive drip uniformity metric — accounts for manufacturing variation + pressure differences.
all_formulas.pitfall: Confusing qv (simpler) with EU — EU is the ASABE standard.
all_formulas.decision: EU > 90% excellent; 80-90% acceptable; <80% redesign.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مقياس شامل لتجانس الري بالتنقيط.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Pressure-Compensating Emitter Range
all_formulas.variables:
q = emitter flow (L/h)
k = emitter constant
P = pressure (kPa)
x = exponent (0 for PC, 0.5 for turbulent, 1 for laminar)
all_formulas.purpose: Predict emitter flow at different pressures — key for slope design.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using x=0.5 for PC emitters (they have x≈0, no pressure sensitivity).
all_formulas.decision: Use PC emitters (x≈0) on slopes >5% or laterals >100m.
all_formulas.notes: Source: ASABE EP458; also Keller & Bliesner (1990).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يتنبأ بتدفق النقاط عند ضغوط مختلفة.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Lateral Head Loss (Darcy-Weisbach simplified)
all_formulas.variables:
hf = head loss (m)
Q = flow (L/s)
C = Hazen-Williams coefficient (150 plastic)
L = length (m)
D = inside diameter (mm)
all_formulas.purpose: Size drip/sprinkler laterals to keep pressure variation < 20%.
all_formulas.pitfall: Forgetting multiple-outlet reduction factor (F ≈ 0.36 for 30+ outlets).
all_formulas.decision: If hf × F > 20% of inlet pressure, upsize diameter or split lateral.
all_formulas.notes: Source: ASABE EP458; Hazen-Williams. Apply F factor for multi-outlet.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تحديد قطر الخطوط الجانبية للحفاظ على تجانس الضغط.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Drip System Application Rate
all_formulas.variables:
I = application rate (mm/h)
q = emitter flow (L/h)
e = emitter efficiency (1.0 for 100%)
S₁ = emitter spacing on lateral (m)
S₂ = lateral spacing (m)
all_formulas.purpose: Calculate how fast drip applies water for scheduling.
all_formulas.example: q=4 L/h, S₁=0.3m, S₂=1.5m → I = 60×4×1/(0.3×1.5) = 533 mm/h (very high — drip is concentrated).
all_formulas.pitfall: Comparing drip I to sprinkler I — drip applies to small wetted volume only.
all_formulas.decision: Convert I to total volume: V = I × t × area / 60.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب سرعة تطبيق الماء بالتنقيط.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: N₂O Direct Emission (IPCC Tier 1)
all_formulas.variables:
F = N input (kg N/ha)
EF = emission factor (0.01 default)
44/28 = N₂O-N → N₂O molecular weight conversion
N₂O = emissions (kg N₂O/ha)
all_formulas.purpose: Estimate direct nitrous oxide emissions from fertilizer — 298× GWP.
all_formulas.example: 200 kg N/ha → N₂O = 200×0.01×1.57 = 3.14 kg N₂O/ha = 936 kg CO₂e/ha.
all_formulas.pitfall: Forgetting the 44/28 conversion; using old EF=0.0125 instead of 2019 value 0.01.
all_formulas.decision: Use enhanced-efficiency fertilizer to cut EF by 35% (IPCC 2019 Table 11.1).
all_formulas.notes: Source: IPCC 2019 Refinement, Vol. 4 Ch. 11, Eq. 11.1.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقدير انبعاثات N₂O من الأسمدة.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: CH₄ from Rice Paddies (IPCC)
all_formulas.variables:
SF = seasonal flux (kg CH₄/ha/day)
CF = conversion factor for water regime
t = cultivation period (days)
28 = GWP of CH₄ (AR5)
all_formulas.purpose: Methane emissions from flooded rice — major GHG in Asia.
all_formulas.example: SF=1.3, CF=0.78 (intermittent), t=110 → CH₄ = 1.3×0.78×110×28 = 3119 kg CO₂e/ha.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using continuously-flooded CF (1.0) for intermittent (0.78) or drained (0.27).
all_formulas.decision: Drain mid-season to cut CH₄ by 40-70%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: انبعاثات الميثان من الأرز المغمور.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Enteric Fermentation CH₄ (Moe & Tyrrell)
all_formulas.variables:
DMI = dry matter intake (kg/day)
NDF% = neutral detergent fiber % of diet
CH₄ = methane (MJ/day)
all_formulas.purpose: Predict cattle methane from diet — key for dairy carbon footprint.
all_formulas.example: DMI=20 kg, NDF=45% → CH₄ = 3.41 + 1.02 - 4.19 = 0.24 MJ/day... (use IPCC Tier 2: Ym=6.5% × GE).
all_formulas.pitfall: Moe & Tyrrell is for dairy; IPCC Tier 2 (Ym=6.5%) is more general.
all_formulas.decision: Increase dietary starch (lower NDF) to reduce CH₄ by 10-20%.
all_formulas.notes: Source: Moe & Tyrrell (1979); IPCC 2019 Vol. 4 Ch. 10.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: التنبؤ بالميثان من النظام الغذائي للأبقار.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: N₂O Indirect (Volatilization + Leaching)
all_formulas.formula: N₂O_ind = (F × Frac_gas × EF_gas + F × Frac_leach × EF_leach) × 44/28
all_formulas.variables:
F = N input (kg N/ha)
Frac_gas = 0.10 (volatilized)
EF_gas = 0.010 (N₂O from NH₃/N0ₓ)
Frac_leach = 0.24 (leached)
EF_leach = 0.011 (N₂O from leaching)
all_formulas.purpose: Captures the N₂O that forms AFTER fertilizer leaves the field — ~40% of total.
all_formulas.pitfall: Forgetting indirect doubles total N₂O estimate; Frac_leach varies by rain.
all_formulas.decision: Split-apply N to cut Frac_leach; use inhibitors to cut Frac_gas.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يلتقط N₂O الذي يتكون بعد مغادرة السماد للحقل.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Soil Carbon Stock Change (IPCC Tier 1)
all_formulas.variables:
SOC_ref = reference SOC stock (t C/ha, 0-30cm)
SOC_current = current stock
Area = hectares
20 = default inventory period (years)
all_formulas.purpose: Quantify soil carbon sequestration for carbon credit verification.
all_formulas.example: Convert to no-till: SOC_ref=50, SOC_current=40, Area=100ha → ΔSOC = 10×100/20 = 50 t C/yr = 183 t CO₂e/yr.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using wrong reference stock for climate/land-use zone.
all_formulas.decision: Use IPCC stock change factors (FLU, FMG, FI) for tier 1; measure for tier 3.
all_formulas.notes: Source: IPCC 2019, Vol. 4 Ch. 5, Eq. 5.1 (SOC stock method).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقدير تخزين الكربون للتحقق من ائتمانات الكربون.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Net Energy for Lactation (NEL)
all_formulas.variables:
TDN = total digestible nutrients (% DM)
NEL = net energy lactation (Mcal/kg DM)
4.184 = Mcal to MJ conversion
all_formulas.purpose: Calculate energy available for milk production — NRC 2021 standard.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using DE or ME instead of NEL — overestimates by 15-25%.
all_formulas.decision: Balance ration at NEL ± 0.05 of cow requirement.
all_formulas.notes: Source: NRC (2021) Nutrient Requirements of Dairy Cattle, Eq. 3-10.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: حساب الطاقة المتاحة لإنتاج الحليب.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: NDF Digestibility (NRC 2021)
all_formulas.variables:
a = soluble fraction
b = insoluble but digestible fraction
c = rate of digestion (1/h)
t = incubation time (h)
all_formulas.purpose: Predict forage digestibility — 1% NDFD = +0.25 kg milk/day.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using 30h in vitro when ration model expects 48h; underestimates.
all_formulas.decision: Select hybrids with NDFD > 60% for high-producing cows.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: التنبؤ بهضم الأعلاف الخشنة.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Methane Prediction (IPCC Tier 2 — dairy)
all_formulas.variables:
GE = gross energy intake (MJ/day)
Ym = methane conversion factor (0.065 dairy, 0.070 beef)
0.0672 = MJ → kg CH₄ conversion
all_formulas.purpose: Daily cattle methane — required for dairy carbon footprint.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using Ym=0.07 for high-grain dairy (should be 0.045-0.060).
all_formulas.decision: Add lipids (3-5% of DM) to reduce Ym by 10-15%.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: ميثان الأبقار اليومي — مطللب للبصمة الكربونية.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Amino Acid Balance (Lys:Met)
all_formulas.variables:
Lys_supply = metabolizable lysine (g/day)
Met_supply = metabolizable methionine (g/day)
all_formulas.purpose: Balance the two most-limiting amino acids for milk protein.
all_formulas.example: Lys=180 g, Met=60 g → Ratio = 3.0. Target 3.0:1 (NRC 2021).
all_formulas.pitfall: Using total AA instead of metabolizable AA; ignoring microbial protein.
all_formulas.decision: Add rumen-protected Met if ratio > 3.2; protected Lys if ratio < 2.8.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: موازنة الأحماض الأمينية المحدودة لبروتين الحليب.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Nitrogen Use Efficiency (NUE)
all_formulas.variables:
N_output = N in harvested product (kg N/ha)
N_input = fertilizer + biological + atmospheric N (kg N/ha)
all_formulas.purpose: Single metric for nitrogen performance — Fertilizers Europe target 50-90%.
all_formulas.example: Wheat: 150 kg N in grain / 180 kg N applied → NUE = 0.83 = 83%.
all_formulas.pitfall: Excluding soil N mineralization; counting only fertilizer N.
all_formulas.decision: NUE < 50%: surplus high, leaching risk. >90%: mining soil N.
all_formulas.notes: Source: Fertilizers Europe (2015) NUE Toolkit; EU Nitrogen Expert Panel.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مقياس واحد لأداء النيتروجين.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: N Surplus (Fertilizers Europe)
all_formulas.variables:
N_input = total N inputs (kg N/ha)
N_output = N in harvested product + residue N (kg N/ha)
all_formulas.purpose: Environmental pressure metric — surpluses >80 kg N/ha risk leaching.
all_formulas.example: Wheat: input=180, output=150 → surplus=30 kg N/ha (safe). Maize: input=250, output=160 → surplus=90 (leaching risk).
all_formulas.pitfall: Forgetting biological N fixation (legumes add 50-300 kg N/ha).
all_formulas.decision: Surplus <50: sustainable. 50-80: caution. >80: action required.
all_formulas.notes: Source: EU Nitrogen Expert Panel (2015); Fertilizers Europe.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مقياس الضغط البيئي — الفائض يخاطر بالترشيح.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Hidden N in Crop Residues
all_formulas.variables:
Yield = grain yield (kg/ha)
HI = harvest index (0.4-0.5 cereals)
N_conc_residue = N concentration in residue (~0.5-1.0%)
all_formulas.purpose: Often-missing N input — residues mineralize 5-20% of their N next season.
all_formulas.pitfall: Assuming 100% of residue N mineralizes year 1 (actual 5-20%).
all_formulas.decision: Credit residue N at 15% mineralization: 19.8×0.15 = 3 kg N/ha credit.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مدخل نيتروجين غالبًا ما يفوت.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: DRIS Index (Diagnosis Recommendation Integrated System)
all_formulas.variables:
N/P = sample ratio
n/p = reference norm ratio
CV = coefficient of variation
All ratios log-normalized for low/high balance
all_formulas.purpose: Diagnose nutrient balance regardless of growth stage — used in leaf analysis.
all_formulas.example: Maize N/P=8 (norm 10, CV=0.15), N/K=1.5 (norm 1.5, CV=0.2) → index = [(8-10)/1.5 + 0]/2 = -0.67 (P relative deficiency).
all_formulas.pitfall: Using wrong reference norms for crop/stage — DRIS is sensitive.
all_formulas.decision: Most negative index = most limiting nutrient. Address first.
all_formulas.notes: Source: Beaufils (1973); Jones (2012) Plant Nutrition Manual Ch. 10.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تشخيص توازن العناصر بغض النظر عن مرحلة النمو.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Critical Value Range (CVR)
all_formulas.variables:
mean = mean of high-yielding population
SD = standard deviation
CVR = 95% sufficient range
all_formulas.purpose: Defines sufficiency ranges for leaf tissue tests.
all_formulas.example: Maize ear-leaf N: mean=3.0%, SD=0.2 → CVR = [2.61%, 3.39%]. Below 2.6 = deficient.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using CVR from a different growth stage or plant part.
all_formulas.decision: Below CVR: apply nutrient. Above: no response expected.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: يحدد نطاقات الكفاية لاختبارات الأوراق.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Sufficiency Range (Marschner)
all_formulas.variables:
mean_low = deficiency threshold
mean_high = luxury threshold
k = 0.25 (lower 25% of sufficiency band)
all_formulas.purpose: Practical range for fertilizer recommendation.
all_formulas.example: Tomato leaf P: low=0.25%, high=0.50% → sufficiency = [0.31%, 0.50%].
all_formulas.pitfall: Confusing sufficiency with critical value — sufficiency is wider.
all_formulas.decision: In sufficiency range: maintain. Below: fertilize. Above: reduce.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: نطاق عملي لتوصية السماد.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Smith Period (Late Blight)
all_formulas.formula: Smith Period = 2 consecutive days with T_min ≥ 10°C and RH ≥ 90% for ≥ 11 hours
all_formulas.variables:
T_min = daily minimum temperature
RH = relative humidity (≥ 90%)
11 hours = minimum duration
all_formulas.purpose: Predict Phytophthora infestans infection risk — UK Met Office standard.
all_formulas.example: 2 days with T_min=12°C, RH=92% for 13h → Smith Period met; high blight risk.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using RH at 2m instead of in-canopy (canopy RH is 5-10% higher).
all_formulas.decision: Apply preventive copper/mancozeb within 24h of Smith Period.
all_formulas.notes: Source: Smith (1956); UK Met Office; validated in BAMF system.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: التنبؤ بخطر الإصابة بـ Phytophthora infestans.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: FAST Model (Early Blight)
all_formulas.variables:
T_score = temperature rating (0-3) for 18-28°C
W_score = leaf wetness rating (0-3) for ≥12h wetness
Score > 30 = spray threshold
all_formulas.purpose: Forecast Alternaria solani on tomato/potato.
all_formulas.example: Day 1: T=2, W=3 (6 pts). Day 2: T=3, W=3 (9 pts). Day 3: T=2, W=2 (4 pts). 7-day total=42 → spray.
all_formulas.pitfall: Counting only rainy days — Alternaria infects with dew alone.
all_formulas.decision: Score ≥ 30: apply chlorothalonil or azoxystrobin.
all_formulas.notes: Source: Madden et al. (1978) FAST model.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تنبؤ بـ Alternaria solani على الطماطم/البطاطس.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: TOM-CAST (Tomato Disease Forecasting)
all_formulas.formula: DSI = Σ (T_score × W_score) where T_score = 0 if T<13 or T>28
all_formulas.variables:
T_score = temperature severity (0-4)
W_score = leaf wetness severity (0-4)
DSI = Disease Severity Index
all_formulas.purpose: Combined early blight + anthracnose forecast for tomato.
all_formulas.example: DSI=35 → first spray. DSI=20 thereafter (every 7 days).
all_formulas.pitfall: Calibrating for dew vs rain-leaf-wetness sensors differ.
all_formulas.decision: Spray at DSI=35 first; DSI=20 thereafter.
all_formulas.notes: Source: Pitblado (1992) TOM-CAST; Ontario Ministry of Ag.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تنبؤ أمراض الطماطم.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Soil Organic Carbon Stock
all_formulas.variables:
SOC% = soil organic carbon (%)
BD = bulk density (g/cm³)
D = depth (cm)
SOC_stock = t C/ha
all_formulas.purpose: Quantify carbon stored in soil — for carbon markets & soil health.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using disturbed (sieved) BD instead of clod BD; ignoring rock fraction.
all_formulas.decision: Increase SOC stock by 1 t/ha/yr via cover crops + no-till.
all_formulas.notes: Source: USDA-NRCS Soil Survey Manual; IPCC 2019.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقدير الكربون المخزن للأسواق وصحة التربة.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Cation Exchange Capacity (effective)
all_formulas.formula: CEC_eff = (Ca²⁺ + Mg²⁺ + K⁺ + Na⁺ + H⁺ + Al³⁺) in meq/100g
all_formulas.variables:
All cations in meq/100g (= cmolc/kg)
CEC_eff = sum of exchangeable cations
all_formulas.purpose: Soil fertility indicator — capacity to hold nutrients.
all_formulas.pitfall: Confusing CEC at field pH vs effective CEC (includes exchangeable Al).
all_formulas.decision: CEC <5 sandy (split fertilize); 10-20 loam; >20 clay.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مؤشر خصوبة التربة — القدرة على الاحتفاظ بالعناصر.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Base Saturation Ratio
all_formulas.variables:
Ca, Mg, K, Na in meq/100g
CEC = total cation exchange capacity
all_formulas.purpose: Albrecht ratio — target Ca 65-75%, Mg 10-15%, K 3-7%.
all_formulas.pitfall: Albrecht ratios not universally accepted; use with soil pH test.
all_formulas.decision: Ca < 60%: apply lime/gypsum. Mg < 10%: apply dolomite.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: نسبة ألبريكت — الأهداف المثالية للكاتيونات.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Soil pH Adjustment (Lime Requirement)
all_formulas.variables:
pH_target = desired pH (e.g. 6.5)
pH_current = measured pH
CEC = cation exchange capacity (meq/100g)
BD = bulk density (g/cm³)
D = depth (cm)
0.5 = empirical lime factor
all_formulas.purpose: Lime dose to raise soil pH — depends on buffering capacity.
all_formulas.example: Target 6.5, current 5.5, CEC=15, BD=1.3, D=15cm → Lime = 1×15×1.3×15×0.5 = 146 t/ha (x2 to convert to CaCO₃).
all_formulas.pitfall: Using SMP buffer incorrectly — only works on certain soils.
all_formulas.decision: Apply in 2 split doses 6 months apart; retest after 1 year.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: جرعة الجير لرفع درجة حموضة التربة.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Water Productivity (Crop)
all_formulas.variables:
Y = crop yield (kg/ha)
ETc = actual evapotranspiration (m³/ha)
WP = water productivity (kg/m³)
all_formulas.purpose: kg of crop per m³ of water — key metric for water-scarce agriculture.
all_formulas.example: Wheat: Y=6000, ETc=5000m³ → WP=1.2 kg/m³. Global benchmark: 1.0-1.5.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using irrigation volume instead of ETc — ignores rain and soil water.
all_formulas.decision: WP < 0.8: improve variety, irrigation timing, or mulching.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: كجم محصول لكل م³ ماء — مقياس رئيسي للزراعة المحدودة المياه.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Irrigation Water Use Efficiency
all_formulas.variables:
Y_irrig = yield with irrigation
Y_rainfed = yield without irrigation
I = irrigation applied (m³/ha)
all_formulas.purpose: Marginal productivity of irrigation — justifies irrigation investment.
all_formulas.example: Y_irrig=8000, Y_rainfed=5000, I=3000 → IWUE = 1.0 kg/m³ additional yield per m³ water.
all_formulas.pitfall: Comparing IWUE across climates — arid regions show higher values.
all_formulas.decision: IWUE < 0.5: reconsider irrigation investment.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: الإنتاجية الحدية للري.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Leaching Requirement (LR)
all_formulas.variables:
EC_iw = irrigation water salinity (dS/m)
EC_threshold = crop salt tolerance threshold (dS/m)
all_formulas.purpose: Extra water needed to flush salts below root zone.
all_formulas.example: Tomato EC_threshold=2.5, EC_iw=3.0 → LR = 3.0/(12.5-3.0) = 0.32 → apply 32% extra water.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using EC of saturation extract (ECe) for EC_iw — wrong scale.
all_formulas.decision: If LR > 0.5, switch to salt-tolerant variety or blend water.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: الماء الإضافي لطرد الأملاح تحت منطقة الجذور.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Yield Gap
all_formulas.variables:
Y_potential = potential yield (variety × climate)
Y_actual = farmer's actual yield
all_formulas.purpose: Quantify unrealized yield — key metric for development programs.
all_formulas.example: Maize Y_potential=12 t/ha, actual=7 → YG = 5 t/ha (42% gap).
all_formulas.pitfall: Using record yield as potential — should be climate-adjusted.
all_formulas.decision: Close yield gap via: 30% nutrient, 25% water, 20% pest, 25% management.
all_formulas.notes: Source: FAO; GYGA (Global Yield Gap Atlas).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقدير الإنتاج غير المحقق.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Harvest Index (HI)
all_formulas.variables:
Y_grain = grain yield (kg/ha)
Y_biomass = total aboveground biomass (kg/ha)
HI = 0 to 1
all_formulas.purpose: Partitioning efficiency — modern varieties HI 0.50; old 0.30.
all_formulas.example: Wheat: grain=6000, biomass=12000 → HI=0.50. Excellent.
all_formulas.pitfall: Including root biomass (changes HI dramatically).
all_formulas.decision: HI < 0.40: improve fertility, water, or disease control.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: كفاءة التقسيم بين الحبوب والكتلة الحيوية.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Partial Budget Analysis
all_formulas.variables:
B_new = benefits of new practice
B_old = benefits of current
C_new = costs of new practice
C_old = costs of current
all_formulas.purpose: Evaluate if a management change is profitable.
all_formulas.example: New fertigation: B_new=$3000/ha, B_old=$2500. C_new=$700, C_old=$400. Net = 500-300 = $200/ha benefit.
all_formulas.pitfall: Forgetting opportunity cost; ignoring risk premium.
all_formulas.decision: Adopt if Net > 0 AND payback < 3 years.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تقييم ربحية تغيير الإدارة.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Body Condition Score Change
all_formulas.variables:
BCS_end = score at end (1-5)
BCS_start = score at start
weeks = observation period
all_formulas.purpose: Monitor energy balance in dairy cows — losing > 0.5 BCS/week is risky.
all_formulas.example: Fresh cow: BCS 3.5 → 3.0 in 4 weeks → change = -0.125/week (acceptable).
all_formulas.pitfall: Subjective scoring — use same trained scorer throughout.
all_formulas.decision: Lose > 0.5/wk: increase energy density; check ketosis.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مراقبة توازن الطاقة في الأبقار.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Water Quality Index (Aquaculture)
all_formulas.variables:
Wi = weight of parameter i
Qi = quality rating (0-100) of parameter i
DO, pH, T, NH₃, turbidity common parameters
all_formulas.purpose: Single metric for aquaculture water quality.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using wrong weights — calibrate to species tolerance.
all_formulas.decision: WQI < 70: water exchange. < 50: emergency harvest.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مقياس واحد لجودة ماء الاستزراع السمكي.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Rotational Grazing Rest Period
all_formulas.variables:
TR = total rest required (days)
n = number of paddocks
PD = paddock grazing duration (days)
all_formulas.purpose: Size rotational grazing system for sustainable forage use.
all_formulas.example: TR=30d, n=8, PD=3d → RP = 30/7 - 3 = 1.3d (too short — increase paddocks).
all_formulas.pitfall: Underestimating regrowth time in dry conditions.
all_formulas.decision: Adjust paddock count to give 25-40 days rest in temperate climates.
all_formulas.notes: Source: USDA-NRCS; Barnes et al. (2007) Forages.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: تحديد نظام الرعي الدوار للاستخدام المستدام.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Feed Conversion Ratio (FCR)
all_formulas.variables:
Feed_DM = feed dry matter intake (kg)
Weight_gain = animal weight gain (kg)
all_formulas.purpose: Efficiency of converting feed to animal mass — key economic metric.
all_formulas.example: Broiler: 3.0 kg feed → 1.6 kg gain → FCR = 1.875. Excellent.
all_formulas.pitfall: Using as-fed feed instead of DM; including mortality.
all_formulas.decision: Cattle FCR > 8: check parasites, genetics. Poultry > 2.2: disease check.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: كفاءة تحويل العلف إلى كتلة حيوانية.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Carbon Footprint per kg Product
all_formulas.variables:
Total_GHG = all emissions (kg CO₂e/ha)
Yield = product yield (kg/ha)
CF = kg CO₂e per kg product
all_formulas.purpose: Compare sustainability across production systems.
all_formulas.example: Wheat: 2000 kg CO₂e/ha / 6000 kg/ha = 0.33 kg CO₂e/kg wheat. Beef: 12000 / 800 = 15 kg CO₂e/kg.
all_formulas.pitfall: Forgetting soil carbon sequestration (net-zero possible).
all_formulas.decision: Benchmark: wheat <0.5, tomato <0.3, chicken <3, beef <20.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: مقارنة الاستدامة عبر نظم الإنتاج.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Sustainability Index (SAFA)
all_formulas.variables:
Econ = economic score (0-100)
Env = environmental score (0-100)
Social = social score (0-100)
Governance = governance score (0-100)
all_formulas.purpose: Holistic sustainability — FAO SAFA framework.
all_formulas.example: Econ=70, Env=55, Social=80, Gov=60 → SI = 66.3 (moderate).
all_formulas.pitfall: Weighting all 4 equally — adjust for stakeholder priorities.
all_formulas.decision: SI < 50: high-risk operation. > 75: leader.
all_formulas.notes: Source: FAO SAFA (2013) Sustainability Assessment of Food and Agriculture.
all_formulas.purpose_ar: استدامة شاملة — إطار SAFA.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)

all_formulas.name: Soil Health Score (Cornell)
all_formulas.formula: SHS = (OC + AC + BS + pH + EC + ROT) / 6
all_formulas.variables:
OC = organic carbon score
AC = active carbon score
BS = base saturation score
pH = pH score
EC = biological activity
ROT = root health rating
Each 0-100
all_formulas.purpose: Comprehensive soil health — Cornell Comprehensive Assessment.
all_formulas.example: OC=60, AC=50, BS=80, pH=85, EC=70, ROT=75 → SHS=70 (good).
all_formulas.pitfall: Sampling only top 15cm — miss subsoil constraints.
all_formulas.decision: SHS <50: plant cover crop, reduce tillage, add compost.
all_formulas.notes: Source: Cornell Soil Health Lab (Moebius-Clune et al. 2016).
all_formulas.purpose_ar: صحة شاملة للتربة — تقييم كورنيل.
all_formulas.part: Trusted-Reference Formulas (FAO-56, USDA-NRCS, ASABE, IPCC, NRC)
